operator: Monaco, Monte-Carlo and Eze Village Small Group Half-Day Tour
review_text: Booked the the 2:00 PM English tour as it was the only one available and it turned out to be great! We rode in a Mercedes Benz van and the ride between cities is absolutely scenic. Plenty of time to take photos from the various viewpoints. Remember to wear comfortable shoes to climb steps and also wear sunscreen. The perfume factory was really interesting. Who knew that it takes 10 years to train to become a Nose. Our guide Isa gave us wonderful restaurant recommendations in Nice and travel tips for the other cities on the SCF. She was super friendly and kept the group engaged with her energy and conversation. The best part of the tour for me was Isa taking a lap for us on the Monaco circuit. Of course this was done a week before the actual race so just remember the race dates and how busy the area will be when booking. But our group of 8 was lucky to get a sneak preview.

operator: Monaco, Monte-Carlo and Eze Village Small Group Half-Day Tour
review_text: Excellent tour!  Vassili was a wonderful guide. He picked us up at our Airbnb, which was so nice. Vassili was very friendly and gave us lots of history about the different areas we visited. Eze was a lovely village that shouldn’t be missed. We walked to the top of Eze and then stopped at souvenir shops along the way down. The perfume factory was not to be missed either. That was a highlight!  Monaco was also so beautiful. We had just enough time in each stop and the ride was comfortable!!!  Would book again.

operator: Monaco, Monte-Carlo and Eze Village Small Group Half-Day Tour
review_text: i had a terrific excursion, perfumery extravaganza, toured Eze mountaintop and town, and above all Monaco for 4+ great hours for a very reasonable fee, with 6 strangers now all best of friends. and my pictures and videos of the coast and Med Sea, mind-blowing, especially to be there in the flesh

operator: Monaco, Monte-Carlo and Eze Village Small Group Half-Day Tour
review_text: We loved our tour to Monaco, Monte Carlo & Eze. It was the perfect amount of time to see these beautiful places. We really enjoyed the perfumery as well.  We ended up going back to all of them later in a rental car we got later on our trip to explore even more. It definitely gives you the chance to see a lot in a short amount of time, without the hassle of renting your own car and worrying about driving in a different country. Daniel was great, informative, and friendly. The van was comfortable, and the group was great! We enjoyed it very much and highly recommend it!

operator: Monaco, Monte-Carlo and Eze Village Small Group Half-Day Tour
review_text: This was the perfect tour from Nice. Our tour guide Catherine was the best. She explained everything about Villefranche, Eze, Monaco, and Monte-Carlo. The van was comfortable and clean. There was plenty of time for us to explore these areas on our own. We bought so many French perfumes to take home as souvenirs. And the highlight was seeing the beautiful cars in Monte Carlo and driving on the Formula 1 racetrack!

operator: Monaco, Monte-Carlo and Eze Village Small Group Half-Day Tour
review_text: This tour was so beautiful and well run.The excursion took us to many beautiful places and gave us enough time at each stop. If you want to spend a half day visiting the sites around Nice, this is the way to do it! The tour highlighted Monaco in a short, but sweet way. We felt like we had seen the highlights of the country after the time we were given! I would definitely recommend this tour.Our tour guide, Daniel, was informative, funny, and made sure to get to know the guests on the trip, which we appreciated. He made sure everyone felt comfortable and was enjoying the trip. He also was very clear about where to be and when and was very efficient. We definitely would recommended taking a tour with him!

operator: Monaco, Monte-Carlo and Eze Village Small Group Half-Day Tour
review_text: Wonderful half day tour of Eze, Monte Carlo, Monaco with amazing guide Laurent who was terrific:  knowledgeable, personable and amazingly adept in managing these busy touristy spots.  Like playing chess, Laurent was always looking two steps ahead on our journey (where to drop us off, how to beat crowd, where to park, where the nearest WC was, etc).  This made for an efficient and easy way to see the beauty of these spots and back in our hotel by 2pm with the rest of the day ahead of us (no trains, waiting, driving - would have taken the entire day + added stress!).  Laurent shared his wealth of knowledge of the area, its history and such interesting and funny tidbits you only get from a local.  Drove us on the actual Formula 1 circuit.  Touring with my two adult daughters and one other delightful couple in the van.   Super accommodating to all of us - ask for Laurent!

operator: Monaco, Monte-Carlo and Eze Village Small Group Half-Day Tour
review_text: Wonderful time in St Jean Cap Ferrat. Visited the Rothschild gardens, day at a beach club, Nice market, Eze village and Monaco.

operator: Monaco, Monte-Carlo and Eze Village Small Group Half-Day Tour
review_text: We would like to express our sincere gratitude to our tour guide Sabina for the wonderfully conducted tour of Monaco,  Monte-Carlo and Eze Village. Sabina is a highly professional, knowledgeable, and passionate guide. She made the tour lively, engaging, and memorable.We would especially like to highlight her warm attitude, attention to detail, and ability to create a friendly atmosphere. The tour was easy, enjoyable, and left us with the most pleasant impressions. We highly recommend Sabina to anyone who wants to truly  enjoy discovering this beautiful plases.

operator: Monaco, Monte-Carlo and Eze Village Small Group Half-Day Tour
review_text: We had an excellent experience with our driver, who arrived on time for pickup and dropped us off exactly where we requested on the return. The trip lasted about five hours, covering Èze and Monaco, and every moment was enjoyable.The driver was professional, knowledgeable, and attentive throughout. He shared helpful information and made sure we felt informed and comfortable at all times. A native French speaker, he communicated clearly in English and had a warm, engaging personality. The trip was also very well organized.I believe his name was VassiliThank you Vassili.

operator: Monaco, Monte-Carlo and Eze Village Small Group Half-Day Tour
review_text: One of the best tours of our 3 week vacation.  The guide Isa is a sincere genuine caring person.  She made each member of the group feel valuable and special.  Isa has great knowledge and insight of all areas we visited.  Eze, Monoco and Monte Carlo were presented in a way to ensure the best guest experience.Isa when went above and beyond to provide advice for Nice for shopping and dining.  Her tour and advice were invaluable to us.We will treasure the memory of our tour with Isa!

operator: Monaco, Monte-Carlo and Eze Village Small Group Half-Day Tour
review_text: We had a fantastic half day tour with our guide, IsaOur pick up time was communicated effectively and we set off from our hotel in good time.The tour was whistle-stop but we still had enough time to enjoy the incredible sights (and smells at the Parfum factory) that the tour offered and pick up a few souvenirs along the way.Isa was friendly, informative and good fun. She handled ‘difficult’ group members excellently with respect and just a little humour.She went above and beyond providing us with brilliant tips for the rest of our holiday to which we are still very grateful.Merci beaucoup!

operator: Monaco, Monte-Carlo and Eze Village Small Group Half-Day Tour
review_text: Ruben was a brilliant guide and was on time with everything. Very good communication. The views in Monaco and Eze were breathtaking. This is a must do tour for someone visiting Nice for the first time. The perfume house visit at the end was also brilliant with the special guided section by Fatima who taught us so much about perfumes and their brand. Really enjoyed this. Thank you.

operator: Monaco, Monte-Carlo and Eze Village Small Group Half-Day Tour
review_text: Had a great time on this tour.  Vasilli was a very patient and knowledgeable guide… provided a lot of historical information and we had enough time at each location.  Vehicle was very comfortable and, overall, the excursion was quite fun!  Definitely recommend.

operator: Monaco, Monte-Carlo and Eze Village Small Group Half-Day Tour
review_text: Our guide, Vasily, was incredibly knowledgeable about the history of Èze, Monaco, and Monte Carlo; we learned so much from him. He was a safe driver without being overly cautious or slow, which made the experience even more enjoyable.He was also very patient with our group of five, including our two-year-old granddaughter; even when some of us lagged behind getting to the pickup point, he remained calm and accommodating.Vasily escorted us to the entrance of Èze, showed us parts of the Monaco Grand Prix course, and even shared great restaurant recommendations for our stay in Nice.If you’re considering this tour, I highly recommend requesting him as your driver. Five stars, without a doubt!

operator: Monaco, Monte-Carlo and Eze Village Small Group Half-Day Tour
review_text: I highly recommend this half-day tour. It’s the perfect way to see the best parts of Eze, Monte Carlo and Monaco. Our guide, Vassili, was excellent! Very friendly, knowledgeable, and punctual. Every stop was well-paced. The van was comfortable and the air conditioning was very appreciated during that hot day. We ended the tour and felt that we had learned so much about these unique places. Thank you Vass for leading this great excursion!

operator: Monaco, Monte-Carlo and Eze Village Small Group Half-Day Tour
review_text: My wife and Ioved the tour. Vassili was very informative and very organized. He was super helpful with the navigation for important landmarks. The trip was very comfortable as well. Highly recommend it.

operator: Monaco, Monte-Carlo and Eze Village Small Group Half-Day Tour
review_text: We had a great half day tour with Vassili. He was very professional, friendly and easy to talk to from the beginning, what made the whole tour really enjoyable! The way he shared all the details and history facts was so interesting and engaging, never boring for a second.The pick-up and drop-off also made everything easy and stress-free.Thank you, Vassili, for this lovely experience - we truly enjoyed it and would highly recommend this tour 🤗

operator: Monaco, Monte-Carlo and Eze Village Small Group Half-Day Tour
review_text: Amazing tour from start to finish! Everything was well organized and ran smoothly, and our guide did a fantastic job making the day both fun and informative. We got to see so many beautiful places, and even had some unexpected highlights (F1 was set up in Monaco for the next day so we got to drive the track!) that made the experience feel extra special. It was the perfect mix of sightseeing, relaxation, and great company—I would absolutely recommend this tour to anyone visiting the area!

operator: Monaco, Monte-Carlo and Eze Village Small Group Half-Day Tour
review_text: the tour was very enjoyable. Our driver, Vassili was excellent in providing the history and highlights of the areas we visited.  He had thorough knowledge of the backroads to Monaco which meant we were able to visit the Principality on a day when there was Formula 1 trials.Vassili was personable and took great care of all of us on the tour. Highly recommend.

operator: Monaco, Monte-Carlo and Eze Village Small Group Half-Day Tour
review_text: Fantastic afternoon viewing the sights of Monaco and Eze with our guide and driver Ruben.Highly recommend if you are short on time and want an easy and comfortable way to see a few places in an afternoon. We traveled in style in an air conditioned Mercedes 8 seater. Our guide Ruben picked us up promptly in Nice at the pre agreed time. Ruben was full of information and insight on the area and made the trip very enjoyable. As an extra bonus we went to a lovely viewing point over the city of Nice on the way home. Definitely recommend!

operator: Monaco, Monte-Carlo and Eze Village Small Group Half-Day Tour
review_text: Our trip was wonderful with our fun and informative guide Ruben. We were staying in Monte Carlo and had trouble making the pickup point in Nice but the Riviera Star Tours company was so helpful in redirecting us to Eze so we could meet the rest of our party. We had a great time touring the medieval village, learning about perfume making, and seeing the sights of Monte Carlo. Ruben was very knowledgeable and had some great jokes to share during the trip! We were able to see so much in our half day trip, and while we wish we could have had more time to explore some of the sights, we felt we were able to get a nice day sightseeing Monaco, Eze, and Nice! Thank you Ruben and team for taking amazing care of us!

operator: Monaco, Monte-Carlo and Eze Village Small Group Half-Day Tour
review_text: Fabulous trip . Sabine driver and guide was really knowledgeable and told us many interesting facts and highlights.  Trip length was perfect. Maybe a tip - there was a perfume museum / shop tour included at Ezę.  I think in hindsight I’d rather have spent the time longer exploring Eze. But I have to add the others thoroughly enjoyed the perfume experience. I’d been to Monaco and Monte Carlo before but it was good to go back and learn some more including driving round F1 circuit.  Well worth the money. If I’d been staying longer I’d  like to have gone on Cannes, Antibes trip

operator: Monaco, Monte-Carlo and Eze Village Small Group Half-Day Tour
review_text: We loved it. Guide was on time, had a lot to tell. We could decide how we spend time at certain stops and we had the feeling that everything was covered. Anytime again. We recommend it.

operator: Monaco, Monte-Carlo and Eze Village Small Group Half-Day Tour
review_text: Ruben was our guide and he was great! We got some history, some fun facts, and all of our questions answered. It was a nice mix of organized sightseeing with some built-in time to do our own exploring. Even our 13 yr old daughter loved it! Highly recommend the tour and Ruben! He can speak multiple languages, so everyone was able to take part.

operator: Monaco, Monte-Carlo and Eze Village Small Group Half-Day Tour
review_text: Fabulous tour, so interesting & beautiful.Superb driver/guide. Excellent value for money.  Enough time in every location. Perfect. Highly recommend.

operator: Monaco, Monte-Carlo and Eze Village Small Group Half-Day Tour
review_text: This trip was absolutely amazing! Everything was very well organized and we enjoyed every second of it. Visiting Monaco, Monte-Carlo and Eze Village in one day was a fantastic experience with beautiful views and great stops.Our guide Vassili was extremely friendly, professional and very knowledgeable. He shared interesting information about each place and made the whole journey enjoyable and relaxed.Highly recommended tour if you are visiting Nice – a perfect way to see so much in one day!

operator: Monaco, Monte-Carlo and Eze Village Small Group Half-Day Tour
review_text: Vassili kicked off the tour energized and enthusiastically. We’d call this tour right-sized in terms of the experience and duration. Vassili packed a lot of history and facts in about Nice and Monaco, very interesting and informative yet not overwhelming. Monaco with its wealth, Formula1, oldest casino and any car enthusiast’s dream car wishlist was quite a scene, but the scenic overlooks and gardens were spectacular. We weren’t rushed, yet never found ourselves bored. Everything was timed with precision, no standing around. The company seems to have special privileges to get you in close to where you want to be. I could go on, but bottom line, just take the tour. It’s a great value.

operator: Monaco, Monte-Carlo and Eze Village Small Group Half-Day Tour
review_text: Brilliant half day tripSmall group, 7 of us.Ruben was our tour guide and he was super. Friendly and knowledgeableIt was an interesting tour of Eze, Monaco, Monte Carlo with short stops in eachCan recommend highly

operator: Monaco, Monte-Carlo and Eze Village Small Group Half-Day Tour
review_text: I happened to do this tour the same weekend that the Formula 1  race was going on but our tour guide, Vassili, managed to pivot well, especially since most of Monaco and Monte-Carlo was closed off.  We were still able to see the casino though (at least the inside), and we even were able to witness cars racing around the track from up high.We went to Eze afterwards to avoid traffic from the Formula 1 crowd, but it was so busy by the time we got there in the early afternoon.  The views from up high are spectacular but it’s annoying having to maneuver through so many tourists in such tight spaces.We ended up skipping the perfumerie tour but still had the option to buy some if we wanted.  Overall 5/5.

operator: Monaco, Monte-Carlo and Eze Village Small Group Half-Day Tour
review_text: The guide was friendly, informative, knowledgeable, and spoke and understood English perfectly . His timing at the sights was well thought out. We were never rushed or bored.  If you can get Isa as your guide, you are  guaranteed commitment and a good time. I usually say something negative, but there wasn't anything. Isa is a  great guy and guide..

operator: Monaco, Monte-Carlo and Eze Village Small Group Half-Day Tour
review_text: This tour was great. The guide was friendly, efficient, and very helpful. Most tours I’ve taken on trips have dragged with unnecessary information, stops, and unneeded time at locations…this one did not. We hit all the best spots with no wasted time. Would highly recommend.

operator: Monaco, Monte-Carlo and Eze Village Small Group Half-Day Tour
review_text: Isa was a great tour guide! We loved the structure of the tour and the timing was perfect at each place. It was a great way to see several places in a half day. I would highly recommend this tour.

operator: Monaco, Monte-Carlo and Eze Village Small Group Half-Day Tour
review_text: We had a wonderful guide who really cared about our experience. He shared alot of information and history and was good about telling us what to look for at each stop. It’s a beautiful area and we had a group of six who all loved the tour.

operator: Monaco, Monte-Carlo and Eze Village Small Group Half-Day Tour
review_text: Moman of Golden Keys Tour was excellent. Good English, can do attitude, and he went out if his way to show us sights I think most guides don’t take the trouble to point out. He even took us to a hang gliding site so I could get a picture of all Monaco. Van was a clean, comfortable Mercedes and had bottles of water waiting. Would definitely use him again.

operator: Monaco, Monte-Carlo and Eze Village Small Group Half-Day Tour
review_text: Five 5️⃣ Stars for a day trip with Riviera Star ToursWe got picked up in a small, comfortable air conditioned Mercedes van outside our hotel today for a day trip to Eze, Monaco and Monte-Carlo trip.Such a fantastic experience!Our tour guide, and driver, was Ruben who made us feel safe and valued. He explained the history of Nice, he told us all about the beautiful Eze and took us around the world famous Monte-Carlo.I fully recommend him and Riviera Star Tours!

operator: Monaco, Monte-Carlo and Eze Village Small Group Half-Day Tour
review_text: Thank you for a truly wonderful day trip! The whole experience was excellent, and a big part of that was thanks to our guide Laurent, who was incredibly knowledgeable, funny, and genuinely pleasant to spend time with. We learned a lot, laughed a lot, and felt very well taken care of throughout the day. Laurent made the trip both enjoyable and memorable. Warm wishes from mom and daugter from Finland.

operator: Monaco, Monte-Carlo and Eze Village Small Group Half-Day Tour
review_text: We loved this trip! Daniel was very kind, friendly and SO informative. We learned so much. This was such a fantastic way to see many sights and have the added benefit of hearing the history and information at the same time. Everything was very smooth. Highly recommend this

operator: Monaco, Monte-Carlo and Eze Village Small Group Half-Day Tour
review_text: Tour was great! Our tour guide, Vas, was super knowledgeable. Eze was beautiful. Perfect half day tour!

operator: Monaco, Monte-Carlo and Eze Village Small Group Half-Day Tour
review_text: The tour was wonderful and very fun!  Our guide, Stephane, was great and had great history and info along the way. I highly recommend the tour. It was a great way to spend the afternoon!

operator: Monaco, Monte-Carlo and Eze Village Small Group Half-Day Tour
review_text: We had a great time on the tour! Drop off/pick ups were easy and we were able to explore a few different places. Vassili was a great guide! He was knowledgeable, on time, and nice.

operator: Monaco, Monte-Carlo and Eze Village Small Group Half-Day Tour
review_text: Our tour guide Vassili was truly amazing!! He was very knowledgeable and a great person to spend a few hours with. He was careful to watch our time, but gave us plenty of time at each stop and detailed instructions when needed. We got lucky as he did not have a tour after ours so we were a bit more relaxed but still would have been ok. The groups are small, no more than eight people so it is very manageable. He recommended a couple of restaurants for dinner. We went to both of them and were more than pleased.

operator: Monaco, Monte-Carlo and Eze Village Small Group Half-Day Tour
review_text: I had a great time with our tour guide, Ruben. He shared so many interesting facts about the places we visited, along with fascinating curiosities that made the experience even more special. Ruben was very open, kind, and engaging, which made the tour enjoyable from start to finish.I’ve attached some photos so you can also see the beauty of the places we explored. Highly recommended! 📸

operator: Monaco, Monte-Carlo and Eze Village Small Group Half-Day Tour
review_text: The guide Katy was very skilled and funny. We stopped several places, and just passed long on each place, and got seen a lot different over the five hours. The guide had a lot of knowledge and drove safely and well.

operator: Monaco, Monte-Carlo and Eze Village Small Group Half-Day Tour
review_text: Francis is a very good guide. Know a lot about the region. Good driver. Very patient and besides an excellent photographer! we had a very pleasant tour with  him.

operator: Monaco, Monte-Carlo and Eze Village Small Group Half-Day Tour
review_text: Booked a last minute tour with kateryna once booked everything was just easy.Great communication with our collection times.Once she arrived super friendly, chatty and lots of information on the trip.If you want a quick and efficient trip and I sure about using public transport this is for you.

operator: Monaco, Monte-Carlo and Eze Village Small Group Half-Day Tour
review_text: Very good experience & value for money .Fabulous guide who was very considerate & helpful .Other people on the trip were very friendly so we all enjoyed it .

operator: Monaco, Monte-Carlo and Eze Village Small Group Half-Day Tour
review_text: Isa was very good tour guide , excellent knowledge and super friendly ! Isa also provided us with recommendations too which was greatly appreciated. Would recommend highly Isa and this tour

operator: Monaco, Monte-Carlo and Eze Village Small Group Half-Day Tour
review_text: Excellent tour with an outstanding guide, Vassili. Loved every stop and only wish it was a full day. Vassili gave us very informative history for each place and provided us with excellent restaurant options in Nice. A very lovely tour.

operator: Monaco, Monte-Carlo and Eze Village Small Group Half-Day Tour
review_text: We had a great time exploring Eze, Monaco and Monte Carlo. It was the perfect amount of the time and our tour guide Isa was absolutely wonderful! Would highly recommend this tour.

operator: The Best of the French Riviera Small group Guided Tour from Nice
review_text: We had a great day seeing the French Riviera with Vassili. His mini van was very comfortable and he was a safe driver. The highlight of our trip was visiting Antibes it is a lovely pretty walled  town beside the port. We would love to return one day. Cannes is picturesque with the castle overlooking the port. Seeing the cathedral and tomb where princess Grace is buried and the royal palace was the highlight in Monaco. Driving F1 track was a bucket list item for one of our group. The wealth in Monte Carlo is something to see. A lovely day out seeing all the French Riviera with Vassili and stopping in the countryside village of Saint Paul De Vance. Nice stop in Eze and make sure to visit the perfumery quick tour of how the perfume is made and then treated to a selection of the perfumes. We would highly recommend this day trip.

operator: The Best of the French Riviera Small group Guided Tour from Nice
review_text: We were a group of 7 women in Nice for a long weekend and made the best decision to do the Best of the French Riviera guided tour from Nice.It was perfect from start to finish.We were collected and dropped back to our hotel by Stephen in a very comfortable 10 seater car. Stephen was an excellent tour guide and made the trip even more interesting with his wealth of knowledge both historical and modern day, sharing interesting facts and insights into the range of places we visited and the famous people who lived there. He was also very  accomodating and great company. We were dropped to the starting point in the various locations we stopped at and everything ran on time. Stephen went above and beyond by booking us into a lovely little restaurant for lunch and patiently waited while we found lost items! It was a taster and a whistle stop tour of surreal locations, including, Monaco, Monte Carlo, Cannes, Ezes, Antibes lasting 10 hours that felt like 1 hour because it was absolutely enthralling.We highly recommend this trip are grateful to Stephen for his warm welcome and excellent service.

operator: The Best of the French Riviera Small group Guided Tour from Nice
review_text: Our guide for the day is Laurent. We are a family of 4, together with another group of 3 and 1, makes up 8 ppl int he group. Laurent has been amazing throughout the day. He explained everything clearly at every stops and informed us of any hints/tips and best way to cover the area with the limited time that we had, as well as warned us of any potential tourist traps. He speaks perfect English and he wears a mike and there's speaker at the back of the car, so we can hear him clearly. It's low season, so not so much crowd. The only place that needs admission is at Eze. We bought the ticket at the bottom of the hill, which helped us to avoid the long queue at the top. Wouldn't have enough time otherwise. It's a long day that covers many places, but it did not feel exhausting. It can be a bit rush as expected. This should be a 2 days tour if you want a more relaxing experience. We are 100% happy with the experience, and would highly recommend it. Thank you, Laurent!

operator: The Best of the French Riviera Small group Guided Tour from Nice
review_text: The tour went exactly as described, and even more. Our guide, Ruben, was energetic and cheerful and helpful the entire long day. We were picked up at exactly the designated time at each of the many stops. Before each point of interest, Ruben gave the full background and tips of how to make the most of our visit. I was amazed at how effortlessly and fluently he constantly switched between English and Spanish to accommodate our group. He was always patiently waiting for us to enjoy the visits, never rushing us. The tour itinerary was so comprehensive that we got to see all the highlights of the French Riviera, from the sea to the mountains, from the cosmopolitan to the Medieval. It was such a perfect tour that the price we paid may have been a bit low for the value!

operator: The Best of the French Riviera Small group Guided Tour from Nice
review_text: Laurent was an excellent guide and driver.  He is so knowledgeable about the area and very entertaining. He immediately knew everyone’s name and made sure everyone felt included and heard. We were able to see so many beautiful sights and  Laurent was able to adapt the itinerary to deal with the crowds in Monaco for the Grand Prix trials. We were even able to watch some of the time trials which was an amazing experience. I highly recommend this tour and Laurent.

operator: The Best of the French Riviera Small group Guided Tour from Nice
review_text: City to see, to experience, with its 7 km promenade bord de merLe vieux Nice is a network of narrow streets full of artists’ workshops, shops and house museums.  On Mondays his antiques brand full of beautiful and curious things. The rest of the days the triumph of flowers and stalls of specialty nicoises.The sea to live in all seasons, a city for everyone from 0 to 99 years. Its surroundings are all to write about, but it will take a separate reviewI'm in love with it

operator: The Best of the French Riviera Small group Guided Tour from Nice
review_text: This day trip was amazing!!  Ruben our guide was incredible. He was super knowledgeable and a great driver. He recommended the best local places after the tour was over as well. We saw so many places on this tour that I would never have been able to do on my own in such a short amount of time. I go on tours in most cities I visit and this was the best!!  Thanks Ruben for maki no all of feel like family.

operator: The Best of the French Riviera Small group Guided Tour from Nice
review_text: This was a wonderful trip!  Stephane picked up my daughters and me right on time in front of our Airbnb.  We were  the last group to get picked up, so we had to sit in the back, but we were able to see everything wonderfully! There were even plugs in the van for us to charge our phones and other devices.  Just bring your cords! We went to Antibes, Eze, Cannes, Monaco and other locations!  We had ample time at each location.  Of course I wanted more time at each stop, but the time was just enough to wet your appetite!  At Eze,  my daughters and I went to the perfume factory. In hindsight, I wish we had skipped the factory and spent more time in the ancient village. Stephane, our guide is FABULOUS!!!! He took great care of us and did everything in his power to ensure we had a pleasant tour!! Take him up on his food recommendations! Every place he recommended that we eat did not disappoint! I highly recommend this tour!!!

operator: The Best of the French Riviera Small group Guided Tour from Nice
review_text: If you are going to do one tour out of Nice, THIS is it.  Sabine was our tour guide and she was phenomenal.  She was kind, knowledgeable and a great communicator.  She picked us up in a nice Mercedes van at our Airbnb .  Well organized, and we saw so much in one day.  I would have never been able to see the amount we did on my own…it would have taken me several days.  It enabled me to really see the French Riviera and I have been on many tours but this one was the BEST!  Book it!

operator: The Best of the French Riviera Small group Guided Tour from Nice
review_text: This tour was amazing. Our guide Amaury was exceptional. We would not have been able to see and enjoy so much in the time we had. Exceeded our expectations. Long day but having a small group was great.   Highly recommend. Good value. Thank you so much. Len, Sue, Stan and Sue

operator: The Best of the French Riviera Small group Guided Tour from Nice
review_text: The small group tour of the French Riviera was wonderful! We had enough time to visit some highlighted areas. Our driver, Vissili, was fabulous! He told us a lot of history, dropped us off at locations close to sites, told us the highlights of the area, gave restaurant recommendations, picked us up on time, and made sure we were back to Nice on time. Maneuvering around the area with traffic, round abouts, and crazy motorcyclists was challenging, but Vissili was a great driver and kept us on schedule the whole time.  I would highly recommend this tour, especially Vissili!

operator: The Best of the French Riviera Small group Guided Tour from Nice
review_text: Exceptional excursion! Very well organized, with Vassili as guide who is friendly and professional, beautiful places visited. A full day to discover the essentials of the French Riviera without stress. I am delighted with this experience and highly recommend!

operator: The Best of the French Riviera Small group Guided Tour from Nice
review_text: Sabine was magnifique and made the magic ! Knowledgeable, warm, friendly and first rate professional. Handled issues with diplomacy and grace. With her charm she gained access to Monaco despite regulations not to enter due to the Monaco Heritage Grand Prix. A highlight of a fantastic experience. Loved it and highly recommend Sabine and this tour.

operator: The Best of the French Riviera Small group Guided Tour from Nice
review_text: I had a very good experience on this tour in Nice and Monaco. Everything was well organized and the timing was perfect.Thank you to our guide and driver, Vassili Nataf. He is very kind, friendly, and professional. He explained clearly and made the trip easy and enjoyable.The car was very clean, comfortable, and looked new.I really enjoyed this tour and highly recommend it. Thank you again!

operator: The Best of the French Riviera Small group Guided Tour from Nice
review_text: A brilliant day with our guide Ruben, superstar fluent in multiple languages. Destination points of interest very apt and special. Lunch at Vence was amazing. Prince Alberts palace guards were spectacular

operator: The Best of the French Riviera Small group Guided Tour from Nice
review_text: It was a wonderful trip guided by Sabine. She was very friendly, explained everything to us in details and full of passion.  It was a great experience and we thank Sabine very much for driving us safely and for learning a lot of amazing French Riviera history. We really hope to see her again. I fully recommend Sabine to all my friends. It was really an unforgettable day.

operator: The Best of the French Riviera Small group Guided Tour from Nice
review_text: Vassili was a really great guide, and the entire itinerary was very well organised. We had enough time at each stop, and he shared useful context about every place before we explored, which made the experience even better.I’d definitely recommend this trip if you’re short on time and want to cover the key highlights of the Riviera ( no admission fee). It’s also perfect if you’re looking for a taster of different places and want to come back later to explore your favourites in more depth

operator: The Best of the French Riviera Small group Guided Tour from Nice
review_text: It was a great way to see get a taste of French Riviera during my short stay. Sabine was an amazing guide. 🫶 it was also easy to communicate with the company to confirm the pick up and drop off point. Highly recommended.

operator: The Best of the French Riviera Small group Guided Tour from Nice
review_text: Well-organized tour, though of short duration. Friendly guide. Covered all spots as listed. Reasonably priced.

operator: The Best of the French Riviera Small group Guided Tour from Nice
review_text: Francis was an excellent guide, super kind and friendly and ensured a pleasant trip. Fun and beautiful stops along the way. Can recommend if you want to see a lot in a day, it’s a jam packed adventure.

operator: The Best of the French Riviera Small group Guided Tour from Nice
review_text: Our guide was very efficient and knowledgeable on the area and site we were seeing. The van was very comfortable. We saw so much and he had the perfect timing for each location considering how much was on the itinerary.

operator: The Best of the French Riviera Small group Guided Tour from Nice
review_text: Excellent experience. Everything that was offered was given. We appreciate punctuality very much. Ruben, our guide and Driver was excellent. We were amazed by his skills in different languages and how he combined, giving good directions and tips and allowing for us to explore freely at the different places we visited. We would highly recommend this trip to anyone who wants to cover most of the French Riviera in a single day.

operator: The Best of the French Riviera Small group Guided Tour from Nice
review_text: Full day trip to Nice, Antibes, Cannes, Saint Paul de Vence, Monaco, and Èze. Probably the best way to get a complete and efficient overview of the landscapes, villages, lifestyle, and history of the French Riviera. We were lucky to have Laurent as our guide, as he provided great insights into the history of the area, local life, major events, art, restaurants, and activities to enjoy there. He was also very efficient, professional, and always mindful of safety when it came to timing and driving, while ensuring we fully enjoyed the trip. Definitely an experience worth trying before deciding which is your favorite spot on the French Riviera!

operator: The Best of the French Riviera Small group Guided Tour from Nice
review_text: An absolutely brilliant day from start  to finish … Sabine our guide was outstanding…. Her attention to detail was amazing, great knowledge, very professional, brilliant driver and really went that extra mile…. Highly recommended this tour , still can’t believe how much of the French Riviera we managed to see in one day … awesome!! Great value for money ….Didn’t feel rushed at all … nothing was too much bother ….

operator: The Best of the French Riviera Small group Guided Tour from Nice
review_text: Always dreamed to visit south of France, and wanted to make my trip productive as had limited time. Liked the idea of meeting new people, instead of exploring solo this time. This was best decision. We had a trip filled with laughter, loads of interesting insights of each areas, and private time to explore with a clear communication. Our tour guide Roxane made my first trip through French rivera a very memorable experience…Cant thank enough.Best of luck in the futureWarm wishesVesta

operator: The Best of the French Riviera Small group Guided Tour from Nice
review_text: This was amazing tour to see all the main sights on the Riviera in one day! Well planned and our guide Sabine was superb. Highly recommend!

operator: The Best of the French Riviera Small group Guided Tour from Nice
review_text: This tour truly exceeded all expectations. It’s a long day, but it’s incredibly well organized and covers so many iconic spots along the French Riviera.Our guide (Sabine) made the experience even better with great stories and local insights. She was punctual, highly organised and genuinely passionate about what she does.Would highly recommend it

operator: The Best of the French Riviera Small group Guided Tour from Nice
review_text: We had a great time on this tour! Vassili was very knowledgeable and spoke English very well. He gave great history points as well. The trip was planned very efficiently and it did not feel like we were out for a full day.  I would recommend this tour for anyone visiting the area for the first time.

operator: The Best of the French Riviera Small group Guided Tour from Nice
review_text: Nice stay and nice satff and nice hotel a I am Hal

operator: The Best of the French Riviera Small group Guided Tour from Nice
review_text: Nice has an excellent antique fair every Monday.  Their silverware dealers have excellent displays.  And a classic baguette sandwich at the Boulangerie is very good lunch.

operator: The Best of the French Riviera Small group Guided Tour from Nice
review_text: Sabine was an excellent guide. She was extremely knowledgeable and friendly.  She was able to get us to an area in Monte Carlo to see the race track even though the E grand prix race was going on.  She knew all the best spots! We felt like VIP's all the way!

operator: The Best of the French Riviera Small group Guided Tour from Nice
review_text: We had the most wonderful tour from Nice . Vassili was our guide and he was excellent! He picked us up promptly, our day went like clockwork and we saw so much! His commentary was clear and informative.I can honestly say this was the highlight of our trip to France.

operator: The Best of the French Riviera Small group Guided Tour from Nice
review_text: We spent a wonderful, albeit very intense, day on the French Riviera. Our guide, Francis, was excellently prepared, told us a lot of interesting stories, showed us the most beautiful places, and is an excellent driver. We recommend exploring the French Riviera with Francis.

operator: The Best of the French Riviera Small group Guided Tour from Nice
review_text: This tour was exactly what I needed to get a sense of the best the French Riviera had to offer. Francis was the perfect tour guide...on time, friendly, knowledgeable, bilingual and attentive to all our guest needs. I would book again and request Francis for sure...Perfect Guide!!!

operator: The Best of the French Riviera Small group Guided Tour from Nice
review_text: What a special day touring the French Riviera! Francis was an amazing guide and allowed us plenty of time to enjoy some of the most beautiful places in the world! He even took us to St Paul de Vence where we had a lovely lunch with new friends! I highly recommend this tour, and ask for Francis if you want to have a trip to remember for a lifetime!

operator: The Best of the French Riviera Small group Guided Tour from Nice
review_text: Together with my husband we had the wonderful 10h viewing of the French Riviera while being led by the extremely professional, friendly and knowledgeable guide: Sabine. We highly recommend the tour to other guests visiting southern France & Monaco.

operator: The Best of the French Riviera Small group Guided Tour from Nice
review_text: Accompanied by the excellent guide, Vassili, we visited several villages on the French Riviera: Cannes, Antibes, Saint Paul de Vince, Eze, Monaco. Vassili gave us lots of information about each city and the different important historical moments. Thank you Vassili we had an unforgettable day with you!😘

operator: The Best of the French Riviera Small group Guided Tour from Nice
review_text: A great tour, incorporating the very best of the French Riviera! (as the title suggests). My girlfriend and I were only visiting for 5 days so thought this would be a great way to see a little bit of everything before we planned the rest of our holiday around the places we passed through - it was extremely helpful in doing that!Roxanne, our tour guide was super friendly and extremely helpful - keeping us entertained and well informed along the way with her wealth of knowledge of the various places we visited.We never got a lot of time at each stop but that is the nature of this tour (it is a lot to cram in) - however, we both felt that it was enough time to see and do a little exploring on our own. This way it gives you the option that if you really liked a place and wanted to go back, you could just catch a train or ride a taxi back in your own time for a proper visit.Would fully recommend anyone visiting to make this the first thing you do - 5 stars! 😃🌟

operator: The Best of the French Riviera Small group Guided Tour from Nice
review_text: We had an excellent tour of the French Riviera with our knowledgeable tour guide, Laurent!Thank you for the great adventure!

operator: The Best of the French Riviera Small group Guided Tour from Nice
review_text: Our guide for the day was Laurent. He was a fantastic guide, very knowledgeable and we enjoyed the day with him so much. So many stunning parts of France. The day was wonderful. Well worth doing this trip and you will be very lucky if you have Laurent as your guide.

operator: The Best of the French Riviera Small group Guided Tour from Nice
review_text: Hello everyone,If you are reading this, then you are on the right track of exploring the sights of Provence and the French Riviera.We took a tour with Sabine and boy was it worth it! From the moment we were picked up to the one where we were dropped off, Sabine treated us like family. She was informative, polite, soft spoken and always willing to go above and beyond to make us feel comfortable throughout the tour.There is no higher compliment that we can pay Sabine and her tour company other than the fact that we decided to do another tour with her the very next day.Thank you so very much Sabine (und hoffentlich, sehen wir uns wieder, wenn nicht auf dieser Welt, dann bestimmt in Bielefeld :-)

operator: The Best of the French Riviera Small group Guided Tour from Nice
review_text: We had a perfect tour and day. So much to see and our guide Roxanne gave us a pleasant and perfectly informative guiding.

operator: The Best of the French Riviera Small group Guided Tour from Nice
review_text: It was a great experience. All very nice. Our guide, Isa, a very gentle and experienced person. He treated us all very well. And always with a very complete and professional narrative, and with all the disposition. I highly recommend it...

operator: The Best of the French Riviera Small group Guided Tour from Nice
review_text: Bello was a stupendous tour guide! His knowledge of the history and culture of the Cote d'Azur added a richness to the beauty of it all. The sights were all breathraking. We highly recommend this tour!Merci, Bello!And thank you, France, for welcoming us!

operator: The Best of the French Riviera Small group Guided Tour from Nice
review_text: Went on the French Riveria All day tour with Vassili.  Loved the communication and even accommodated my friends that were late to our tour. He was very knowledgeable and shared many laughs. Highly recommend this trip especially with Vassili.

operator: The Best of the French Riviera Small group Guided Tour from Nice
review_text: Fantastique! We had the best guide, Ruben. We saw and learned so much. Ruben made us laugh,  gave us unexpected surprises and showed us just how lovely and beautiful the Riviera is. If I could I'd do it all again with Ruben

operator: The Best of the French Riviera Small group Guided Tour from Nice
review_text: It was terrific! Francis was our guide and he took us everywhere. Made sure that we had lots of time at the stops and explained so much history along the way. I would highly recommend this tour!

operator: The Best of the French Riviera Small group Guided Tour from Nice
review_text: Excellent value for money. Saw places that I would have struggled as I am a solo traveller

operator: The Best of the French Riviera Small group Guided Tour from Nice
review_text: best and easiest way see the the french riviera !our driver salvador was so knowledgeable and witty and just an overall amazing person to be the guide around.

operator: The Best of the French Riviera Small group Guided Tour from Nice
review_text: Our tour guide Francis was absolutely amazing. He knew a lot interesting facts about history, about novelties, about restaurants, little facts here and there. Basically, everything you should want to know/ get in a trip like this.100% recommend booking tour with Francis, and this tour specifically was just breathtaking views, must watch sites and just beautiful 💛

operator: Catamaran cruise on the French Riviera
review_text: Very organized the driver texted on what’s app the night before on the meet up time. The meet up address was accurate. He was on time and drove us to the boat. The staff on the boat were very friendly and helpful. The boat was nice, clean and snacks and drinks onboard were delicious. While at sea they were very helpful with taking the paddle boards on and off the boat. We were waiting for another family that didn’t make it so they extended our time on the sea to give us the appropriate amount of time the itinerary had. It was a great experience highly recommend the water and views are beautiful.

operator: Provence Wine Tour - Small Group Tour from Nice
review_text: This was the most amazing wine tour we have ever been on! Very comprehensive and enjoyable!! Our guide Gigi was incredible! We learned so much and had so much fun with her and the rest of the small group!! The size of the group and the length of the tour were perfect! We toured the most beautiful and quaint wineries! Amazing local lunch in between tours! This tour is an absolute must do for your trip to the region if you love rosé, white wine, or even reds!

operator: Provence Wine Tour - Small Group Tour from Nice
review_text: This is a tour I would highly recommend! Our guide Peter was very knowledgeable about wine/winery and answered all questions attentively, learning a lot from the history of wineries to how to enjoy wine. All 3 chateaux are different in character, and the satisfaction was very high, with a cave ageing shed that can only be visited because of the tour and 6-7 wines available in each chateau (we had 21 in total)!

operator: Provence Wine Tour - Small Group Tour from Nice
review_text: We had a great time! Méline our guide was very kind and knowledgeable. We went to 3 wineries and had some incredible wine. Lunch was great in a little rustic town, overall a great day. Would recommend/would book again as they go to different wineries

operator: Provence Wine Tour - Small Group Tour from Nice
review_text: What a lovely day!We tried a lot of fine wine, we saw some beautiful vineyards and we got everywhere on time.Peter was an excellent guide!I can absolutely recommend that experience.

operator: Provence Wine Tour - Small Group Tour from Nice
review_text: We visited three great wineries in the area and tasted excellent wines while learning about Provence wine production. Very informative and enjoyable tour, and Peter was a great guide!

operator: Provence Wine Tour - Small Group Tour from Nice
review_text: Peter was a fabulous guide for this tour. Extremely knowledgeable about the area and the wines. We rode in comfort in a Mercedes van and spent quality time at each vineyard. The wines were all excellent. I highly recommend this tour.

operator: Provence Wine Tour - Small Group Tour from Nice
review_text: Our tour with Edwin was superb from start to finish.He was super friendly and  knowledgeable a perfect guide for our wine tour. Our lunch spot was also lovely with beautiful food. Thank you for a wonderful experience and we would highly recommend.

operator: Provence Wine Tour - Small Group Tour from Nice
review_text: Everything I hoped for and more. Our tour guide and Sommelier Edwin was phenomenal. I learned so much and am grateful for the life lasting memory.

operator: Provence Wine Tour - Small Group Tour from Nice
review_text: This was the highlight of our trip to Nice! A wine tour is only as good as its guide, and Peter absolutely made the experience 10/10.Not only did he know his wines, but he was also a great entertainer and conversationalist throughout the day. You can tell he has a true passion for wine and giving tours, it shows through his work. The 8 person group is a perfect size, from our first stop we all got along quite well which makes the experience that much better.I cannot recommend this tour enough!

operator: Provence Wine Tour - Small Group Tour from Nice
review_text: This is a full day tour of the provence  wine region . Peter was our guide . He was extremely knowledgeable about the wines and the region . We stopped at 3 different wineries and sampled about 12 or so different wines( white , red and rose)We enjoyed the small group setting - highly recommend.

operator: Provence Wine Tour - Small Group Tour from Nice
review_text: We had a really lovely day out with Méline and the other guests.  We had a group of 6 of us and everyone was relaxed and the pace was quite nice.  Our guide was extremely knowledgable and engaging and helped reinforce the vital connection between the vineyards and the Provence region.  If I had one thing to change, we may have opted out of the lunch and just strolled around the small village on our own - but we didn't want to seem rude to the other guests - and we did have a lovely long sit down and spirited conversation with the group!  (We're just not big "lunch" eaters.)

operator: Provence Wine Tour - Small Group Tour from Nice
review_text: We had a wonderful day exploring the wines of Provence. Peter was very knowledgeable and made the day enjoyable all around. Would highly recommend!

operator: Provence Wine Tour - Small Group Tour from Nice
review_text: We met Cedric at 9:30, he welcomed each one of us and then we were on our way.  As we journeyed to our first winery, he explained the importance of the weather, type of soil and the wind, and how homes the grapes to perfection.  Cedric is very educated as well as entertaining.  We had fun while growing our knowledge about the grapes grown in Provence and the wines made there of.

operator: Provence Wine Tour - Small Group Tour from Nice
review_text: Really enjoyed the whole experience .Peter was very informative and the wines were lovely.

operator: Provence Wine Tour - Small Group Tour from Nice
review_text: Great your guide, quaint beautiful vineyard

operator: Provence Wine Tour - Small Group Tour from Nice
review_text: Very informative tour and guide Ghyslaine knows very interesting.

operator: Provence Wine Tour - Small Group Tour from Nice
review_text: Great experience and the guide Frank was very knowledgable .

operator: Provence Wine Tour - Small Group Tour from Nice
review_text: 10/10 - Highly recommend this tour! It was the perfect way to see wine country, and completely worth the value. We had a small, fun group of 8. Stopped at 3 wineries with lunch in between (2 large wineries and a very quaint small vineyard). The lunch stop was delicious. Our guide, Franck, was extremely knowledgeable and attentive. It was a great experience, and the wine was also amazing as well!!

operator: Provence Wine Tour - Small Group Tour from Nice
review_text: I mean, there is no better word than perfect!Absolutely stunning vineyards, truly magnificent and beautiful. Our guide, Frank, was deeply knowledgeable of all aspects of both wine making and the area. There wasnt a question left unanswered!The car ride was super comfortable, the staff at the vineyards were perfect hosts and the wine was to die for. We are already planning our next trip back!

operator: Provence Wine Tour - Small Group Tour from Nice
review_text: I’ve enjoyed this tour very much. It was fun very informative and interactive. The wine was very good and we’ve enjoyed it from three different organic wineries. Our tour guide Andrea was very knowledgeable and he engaged our senses to become better connoisseurs of wine. It was a day of tasting grapevine and making new friends. Highly recommended!

operator: Provence Wine Tour - Small Group Tour from Nice
review_text: Had a really lovely day with this company. The staff were very helpful, the guide very knowledgeable and the transport very comfortable. Visited some beautiful vineyards and tried lots of very interesting wines. Would definitely recommend.

operator: Provence Wine Tour - Small Group Tour from Nice
review_text: We spent an incredible day wine tasting in Provence with Edwin and a small group, and it was hands down the best wine experience we’ve ever had. My husband and I have gone tasting all over the world, and Edwin stands out as the most knowledgeable, engaging, and fun guide we’ve met. He not only shared insights about the region and wines but also coached us through the how and why of proper tasting in a way that completely elevated the experience without being pretentious at all. This was easily one of the highlights of our entire trip — we’d book another tour with Edwin and Azur Wine Tours again in a heartbeat!

operator: Provence Wine Tour - Small Group Tour from Nice
review_text: What a fantastic day we had with our fellow passengers from America, Canada and Bolivia. Would highly recommend booking this tour!   Peter, our guide and driver was worth his weight in gold. His knowledge of the region and the wineries history, etc, was outstanding.  He really did educate us on all wine types throughout the day.  The wineries and wines are some of the best places I have seen and have ever tasted.   Well worth the money. Just wish I had bought more wine to take home!!!!

operator: Provence Wine Tour - Small Group Tour from Nice
review_text: This was an incredibly curated experience and the perfect end to our trip to France. Your guide picks you up in downtown Nice and then you drive 1-1.5 hours to the country to visit 3 wineries. I think it was supposed to be 5 wines per winery, but we ended up tasting more. Our guide was incredibly friendly and knowledgeable about the different wineries and wines at each. Highly recommend this tour!

operator: Provence Wine Tour - Small Group Tour from Nice
review_text: This tour is awesome!  If you want a great experience learning more about Provence wine and having fun discovering several local wineries - look no further, this is it!  Our guide Franck was the best. Super knowledgeable about all the details of winemaking, all the different regions, AOPs, and much more. He is also very friendly and genuinely interested in making sure everyone has a great experience. The three wineries we visited were all a bit different and beautiful. Of course the wines were delicious also!  We purchased several bottles to take home. We have been on several wine tours in different countries and this was is for sure the best. Book this one and you will not regret it!

operator: Provence Wine Tour - Small Group Tour from Nice
review_text: Amazing day with our guide Edwin. We learned a lot and visited three very different wineries. Great wine and a laidback vibe. Highly recommend!

operator: Provence Wine Tour - Small Group Tour from Nice
review_text: Went with my wife and was a part of a group of 8. Gigi was not only our driver, but also our winery tour guide and tasting master.Great experience - the 3 wineries had amazing wine, lunch was is a nice little town, great tours into the cellars and the room below Font De Bruc is one of the most incredible rooms I’ve ever seen in a winery! Gigi is very knowledgeable and gives a good explanation of everything through the day.There is a bit of driving around involved and with traffic can be a bit slower but the scenery/ views makes it much more bearable.

operator: Provence Wine Tour - Small Group Tour from Nice
review_text: We thoroughly enjoyed our tours to 3 wineries in Provence. Laura was extremelyCharming and just a lovely young woman. Full of very interesting information and a very competent and capable driver. We loved our tours, loved the wine tasting and would go again!

operator: Provence Wine Tour - Small Group Tour from Nice
review_text: We had a wonderful day on the wine tour. We visited three different wineries. All different in their own way and tasted lots of wine, including a  (not included) lunch at a lovely restaurant, deep in the heart of Provence. Our guide was very knowledgeable, with a great sense of humour. He told some interesting stories about wine and the vineyards we visited. It was a really informative and fun day with some lovely people on the tour. My only slight complaint was that it finished later than advertised (as we were having a great time), but this did mean we missed a dinner reservation - give plenty of time!

operator: Provence Wine Tour - Small Group Tour from Nice
review_text: Our guide was super knowledgeable and we learned so much. We also visited a variety of different wineries which gave us a look at different wine making styles. Was a great day, would recommend.

operator: Provence Wine Tour - Small Group Tour from Nice
review_text: We had a lovely day - and learned a lot! Cedric was funny, very nice, and extremely informative. I would recommend to anyone!

operator: Provence Wine Tour - Small Group Tour from Nice
review_text: Our guide, Peter, was the best. He took us to some really beautiful châteaus and hidden gems. Everything was just wonderful!

operator: Provence Wine Tour - Small Group Tour from Nice
review_text: My fiancé and I had an EXTRAORDINARY time on our tour with Peter. He was extremely knowledgeable on all the wines that came from both the region and each winery we went to. Every winery was absolutely stunning and the wine itself was very high quality. We even got the chance to try a grape off the vine and some fresh olive oil as well. Truly an incredible experience that I would recommend to others and book again the next time I’m here!

operator: Provence Wine Tour - Small Group Tour from Nice
review_text: We really enjoyed our full day wine tour with Andrea as our guide.  We went to 3 interesting wineries (and bought a lot of wine at the last one!) and also had time to stop and have lunch in Les Arcs.  Andrea is clearly an expert in wines and we all learned a lot about wines, how to evaluate different wines, and wine making.  We very much enjoyed spending time with him.  I think we were able to try about 16 or 17 different wines -- rose', whites, and reds and got a very good overview of the wines that are made in Provence.

operator: Provence Wine Tour - Small Group Tour from Nice
review_text: Peter was an excellent guide and most patient.  He answered all of our questions … and there were many.  He was never at a loss with an answer.  He gave us a history lesson on Rose’ wines … the wineries we all very nice 😊… and the wines, Rose’ and white wines were most delish… the views spectacular.  This tour was worth every penny.  Caution: I f you have a car, take a train, taxi or Uber to the meeting point!!

operator: Provence Wine Tour - Small Group Tour from Nice
review_text: Our guide was an expert in the wine field and very passionate.  We learned so much.  We went to 3 locally owned wineries and had a fabulous gourmet lunch in the middle.  Very generous pours and a great variety.  Very thorough and immersive day.  I highly recommend!

operator: Provence Wine Tour - Small Group Tour from Nice
review_text: The Trip was really nice. The places we visited where wunderful and we got to taste a lot of wines und learned alot about them. The guide peter was amazing! such a nice soul. he really knew what he was talking about! Would recomend anytime!

operator: Provence Wine Tour - Small Group Tour from Nice
review_text: The wine was excellent, and the people and atmosphere were excellent. Everything was beautiful. Our tour guide was very kind and informational. Good driving.

operator: Provence Wine Tour - Small Group Tour from Nice
review_text: This was en excellent winetour, with visits on three wineries, and all of them were very different between each other in style and approch.The guide was really nice and informative. The tour was made in a perfect schedule, so we had enough time every where.We also had time for a nice lunch in Les Arcs.I can really recommend this tour!

operator: Provence Wine Tour - Small Group Tour from Nice
review_text: This tour was absolutely lovely. From the small group of amazing friends we met to your tour guide, Laura, who was very knowledgeable and gracious with us as we asked questions, took pictures, and had some fun. I would highly recommend this tour especially if you are looking for a château that you can send wine home to. We ordered 6 bottles from our first stop to be shipped back to the U.S.

operator: Provence Wine Tour - Small Group Tour from Nice
review_text: We had a wonderful day exploring this beautiful region of France. Comfortable vehicle, short travel time, knowledgeable guide to lead us around who had a genuine love and appreciation for the wine making process to share with us. Such a wonderful experience!

operator: Provence Wine Tour - Small Group Tour from Nice
review_text: The most fun and very informative tour around in Provence. It was exciting to visit 3 different vineyards and the guide Cedric had found the best place in the area for lunch. All in all a fantastic trip - thanks to the whole group for a really good and entertaining trip.

operator: Provence Wine Tour - Small Group Tour from Nice
review_text: Came as strangers and left as friends! We had a wonderful time traveling to three vineyards and sampling 17 wines. Our tour guide, Franck, was extremely knowledgeable and was so friendly. This was one of our favorite experiences from our whole trip and we would definitely recommend it to anyone interested in tasting some delicious wine and meeting new people!

operator: Provence Wine Tour - Small Group Tour from Nice
review_text: My wife and I took this tour on our honeymoon. Ghislaine was our tour guide and was absolutely fantastic! She was very knowledgeable on the regions and the wineries. We toured 3 beautiful wineries and tasted several wines at each location. I would highly recommend this tour!

operator: Provence Wine Tour - Small Group Tour from Nice
review_text: Friendly and cozy tour guide with lots of knowledge, beautiful surroundings and fine wines. This area is mainly made of rose, but there are also delicious red and white wines. During the tasting, the friendly guide will tell you more about the area, the grape varieties and of course the wine itself. You can also take a look inside the winegrowers, where you will be explained the impressive methods of making the wine. Definitely recommended for anyone who loves wine and wants to gain knowledge about making and tasting wine!Little tip: we went in June, when everything was beautiful in bloom and nature was beautiful. But around the end of August/beginning of September the grapes are ripe and can actually be tasted. We will definitely be back around that season to experience that too!

operator: Provence Wine Tour - Small Group Tour from Nice
review_text: Caroline is an incredible guide. So knowledgeable - the most knowledgeable wine tour guide - I’ve come across. And, approachable, friendly and nice. We visited three great wineries - the first and third were real highlights due to the property/setting, the history and the wine. Great experience all around. (Although, the van is a little small/cramped with 8 people. Totally manageable, but just know that going in!)

operator: Provence Wine Tour - Small Group Tour from Nice
review_text: Frank was a great guide; very knowledgeable. We enjoyed the tour and learned lots about Provence and rose wines! We had a great group as well to enjoy the experience with.

operator: Provence Wine Tour - Small Group Tour from Nice
review_text: Very well arranged , an experience in both taste and how they work .Nice vineyards we got to visit.Our guide Meline was superb

operator: Provence Wine Tour - Small Group Tour from Nice
review_text: Our guide Peter was very knowledgeable and kind.  He took us to three wineries which lasted most of the day.  The wineries were beautiful.  He answered all of our questions and made our trip a memorable experience.

operator: Provence Wine Tour - Small Group Tour from Nice
review_text: Peter knew so much about the region, the people and the wine. He took us to Vineyards we couldn’t have gotten to on our own. Caves, gorgeous scenery and castles!

operator: Excursion partagée Eze, Monaco & Monte Carlo from Nice
review_text: My friend and I did the half day tour starting in the afternoon. The 5 hour tour was fun, casual, informative and a great experience. We had a wonderful driver and tour guide and 5 other nice guests aboard. The driver gave us our own time in each location which allowed us to follow our own desires. We had a blast in Monaco driving on the Grand Prix track! I would highly recommend this tour.

operator: Excursion partagée Eze, Monaco & Monte Carlo from Nice
review_text: After reading some of the reviews here I was a bit nervous, but it’s safe to say this trip really exceeded my expectations. Our guide Parfait was super knowledgable and told us loads about all the places we were visiting and I felt we had ample amounts of time at each of the locations. A personal highlight was visiting the botanical gardens at Eze (€10 for an adult) but such wonderful views!

operator: Excursion partagée Eze, Monaco & Monte Carlo from Nice
review_text: This was an excellent tour, great combo of interesting information given by our guide Clinton while driving and time to explore on our own.  Clinton is fluent in several languages and  accommodated the two nationalities on our tour with perfect ease.  Would highly recommend!

operator: Excursion partagée Eze, Monaco & Monte Carlo from Nice
review_text: A great experience.It was a nice cruise in the company of a kind and friendly driver in a comfortable vehicle.

operator: Excursion partagée Eze, Monaco & Monte Carlo from Nice
review_text: Francois was fantastic! He kept our group on track throughout the day and shared great historical insights at each stop. The tour was well-paced, informative, and really enjoyable because of him. Highly recommend!

operator: Excursion partagée Eze, Monaco & Monte Carlo from Nice
review_text: A fantastic trip! Well planed, and with so many beautiful sights 👀 Our guide David was great, making jokes, and the ride and facts of locations so enjoyable. Would recommend this to anyone wanting to see Nice, and only has a short stay.

operator: Excursion partagée Eze, Monaco & Monte Carlo from Nice
review_text: My guide wasn’t great. Didn’t speak English well, his driving was very fast and erratic and most of all he kept hitting on me during the trip and made me very uncomfortable. I even had to block him from contacting me on what’s app and my cell phone.!!!

operator: Excursion partagée Eze, Monaco & Monte Carlo from Nice
review_text: If you are on a cruise ship, DO NOT BOOK WITH THIS COMPANY.  Our ship did not dock in Nice due to weather on May 15th.  I gave them as much notice as I could. They would not offer a refund.  They also never returned my WhatsApp texts to them requesting a refund.  I had been communicating before with people, including "Peter".  Peter would not reply to my messages once I told him we would not dock.  Don't advertise this as a "Shore Excursion" if you don't stand by a policy of refunding if the ship changes it's schedule and you miss the tour due to no fault of your own.  Book with another company.

operator: Excursion partagée Eze, Monaco & Monte Carlo from Nice
review_text: Unbelievable that we hired a tour with a guide in Spanish and no one spoke that language. The guide did his best speaking English, French and especially Russian because it was the language of the rest of the passengers. The tour was very rushed and there was little time left to see the attractions. In this context, it is inexplicable the long and tedious visit to Fragonard perfumery only intended to sell perfumes to tourists because it is made in Grasse and not in Eze. That visit took up almost all the time we had to visit the beautiful village of Eze. We had to go up and down in a hurry for lack of time and we didn't even get to see the gardens.  I rescue the effort, the skill behind the wheel of the guide and his willingness.

operator: Excursion partagée Eze, Monaco & Monte Carlo from Nice
review_text: They indicate that the tour is in Spanish and not true. Without warning. When claiming they do not refund. It's a hoax. Eye! Waste of time and money wasted!

operator: Excursion partagée Eze, Monaco & Monte Carlo from Nice

Janis managed to squeeze in two stops in Monaco /Monte Carlo and took us on the Grand Prix circuit. Thoroughly enjoyed it.

operator: Excursion partagée Eze, Monaco & Monte Carlo from Nice
review_text: The trip was wonderful. We got to see some beautiful places and our guide was fabulous. Would highly recommend this tour. It was a perfect length of time for myself and my son.

operator: Excursion partagée Eze, Monaco & Monte Carlo from Nice

operator: Excursion partagée Eze, Monaco & Monte Carlo from Nice
review_text: It was a memorable experience, the guide David was sensational, careful and respectful with the group. He explained several historical facts and made the tour much cooler! We recommend too much, and congratulations to David for the excellent work.

operator: Excursion partagée Eze, Monaco & Monte Carlo from Nice
review_text: A great way to see a number of attractions and not have to do the driving your self :  visiting the perfume factory was an pleasant surprise :  the other passengers were all very pleasant and it was an enjoyable four hours of sightseeing

operator: Excursion partagée Eze, Monaco & Monte Carlo from Nice
review_text: Jaba, our energetic driver and guide dropped us off for (breath-taking) views and/or walk arounds at 5-6 key spots. There were 7!of us in the van, apparently normal. It’s a great way to see Monaco and Eze. The only negative was the perfume factory tour stop which was a bit dull.

operator: Excursion partagée Eze, Monaco & Monte Carlo from Nice

operator: Excursion partagée Eze, Monaco & Monte Carlo from Nice
review_text: I can accept a late pick up or apologies for cancellation even at short notice but when the  tour operator through the supply VIATOR is untruthful  saying the driver said he was at my location for pick up for 20 minutes when he was not is awful customer service why would I lie as I have several witnesses that can tell you I was outside the hotel in Nice the address. Gave the operator and VIATOR at approximately 8-20am until 9-20 I called them the company several times and vented my frustration .For someone to mislead in such a way is really bad for any company and the operator …used even know cctv for outside the hotel backs my argument it is ridiculous I even sent messages from 8-41am from outside the hotel no one came no one waited and if someone says they were outside that address that I gave for pick up then they are not being honestI was told by VIATOR (as French Riviera were not taking calls or answering emails despite numerous attempts) that I would get a refund and then get another email stating I would not be refunded as the driver was there….terrible service poor courtesy and an untruthful driver …offering me by email a next day trip (when I have no way on a Sunday to reply And I’m home Monday) is ridiculous and greedy ..beware this company

operator: Excursion partagée Eze, Monaco & Monte Carlo from Nice
