operator: Excursion partagée Eze, Monaco & Monte Carlo from Nice
review_text: We enjoyed our trip to Monte Carlo, we thought the perfume factory stop too long, 50 mins .. 20 mins would have been better and then  spend more time in Monte Carlo .. as we would have loved to walked in the casino area, (we just drive past). At the perfume factory my husband sat outside with his book as he had no interest in that stop, our driver offered to take him to the local cafe but he declined and waited for me.The driver was good, a good driver but not a tour guide, unfortunately .. he didn’t say a single word about the history or anything about the places we were visiting …I did appreciate he got us to the palace in time for the changing of the guards. He was a nice guy but it would have been nice to be told a little history of the places we visited.

operator: Excursion partagée Eze, Monaco & Monte Carlo from Nice
review_text: The guide did not speak French although we were confirmed a Francophone gyide. Actually, he wasn't a guide, he was more of a carrier...

operator: Excursion partagée Eze, Monaco & Monte Carlo from Nice
review_text: An embarrassment, we paid for the tour with a guide in Spanish, like other passengers and it was total.ente in English. Impossible to learn anything.

operator: Excursion partagée Eze, Monaco & Monte Carlo from Nice
review_text: I was initially impressed that we were able to pick our pickup/drop off location and chosen language on the Tripadvisor website for our day trip to Eze, Monaco and Monte Carlo.  When we received our confirmation message from the guide, he gave us another location to meet up at even though we had stated that our chosen spot was closer. Our guide spoke both Russian and English and unfortunately for us the other family on the tour spoke Russian, so that is what was spoken the entire time we were on the trip. We were not spoken to at all in the back seat and just followed along to the stops. I am allergic to perfume so our guide was kind enough to drop me off at the castle early while the others toured the perfumery. However, the other group took extra time at the perfumery so we waited at the base of the castle to find out what the plan was for the other half of the trip. On our way to Monaco nothing was discussed about the next stop. Our guide pulled over at the side of the road and told us to walk up the steps and that 3 minutes away was the palace, shopping and sites. He then left with the other group and did not tell us where they went. The "3 minute walk" turned into a 35 minute walk uphill. We had approximately 5 minutes to look around and then started to walk back down the hill to meet the group. The guide called us to tell us we were late and when we said that it was not 3 minutes away and that he was more than welcome to come and get us, he replied that he would wait for us. Our last stop was the casino and when the other group was late returning, no phone calls were made, we simply sat and waited. During the trip they controlled the air conditioning, music choice, charged their phones and did not speak to us at all. I am disappointed that I spent that much money for the tour. The fact that we were not spoken to in a language that we could understand was not acceptable. Of note, the van was as described and our guide was more or less on time within the scheduled time period.  We made it to all 3 locations as advertised, but the experience left a lot to be desired.

operator: Excursion partagée Eze, Monaco & Monte Carlo from Nice
review_text: Stops were great (mostly) - driver was great - saw the key sites, so for that it's awesome.  But as cutesy as the Fragonard manufacturer and shop are (nice people too) - make no mistake - this is a 50 minute hold you hostage to have them try to sell you their perfume.  Everything else is rushed to fit this long tour in.  Should be a 10-15 minute stop to go in if you want to vs. rushing us with 15 minutes in Monte Carlo and maybe 30 minutes to cover all of Monaco.  Some overview of the perfume making process, but the majority of the time is having you try samples one by one and letting you know the discounts and costs for each one.  This is not a "plus" or another "fun" destination -- it felt like a time share situation where we'll give you this tour to other sites, but first you have to be part of an hour tour at this tiny, mostly uninteresting facility.  Except without the free part of the tour - you're still paying for the other sites.  Just have us spend more time in Eze or Monaco - why even throw this in unless this tour is getting money from Fragonard.  The (granted she was nice) tour guide gave us a sheet of paper to bring to checkout so that she got her commission for every sale of her captive audience.  Really?  Big waste of time for what could be a really good tour otherwise.

operator: Excursion partagée Eze, Monaco & Monte Carlo from Nice
review_text: The driver came on time. But not good English. Couldn’t understand at all. He didn’t explain much even though he was not a guide.Spent too much time in the perfume place. We were not interested and was not told we have to go there.Other places We were allowed to see it by ourselves. Not explaining anything.Not that great and would not recommend others to take this tour.For no French speaking people you should give English speaking drivers so that we can ask questions.His English was very bad and not good at all good.Very bad pronunciation of English.Train some English speaking drivers for foreigners.Not satisfied.

operator: Excursion partagée Eze, Monaco & Monte Carlo from Nice
review_text: The operator did not come to pick up us infront of the hotel. We waited for an hour and asked the hotel manager to contact the operator. They said we are planned for tomorrow despite the ticket we presented.

operator: Excursion partagée Eze, Monaco & Monte Carlo from Nice
review_text: I’m unsure if this tour was a scam or if I just had a bad experience, however I purchased this tour and my booking was confirmed but nobody ever showed up. I reached out to the tour operator via phone and sent  messages thinking maybe there was a delayed pickup time, my calls went unanswered and I never received a response regarding the booking. I wouldn’t recommend booking this tour.

operator: Excursion partagée Eze, Monaco & Monte Carlo from Nice
review_text: We did not make the trip, no one contacted us, we want the refund of the payment. We have not been able to contact the responsible Enterprise.

operator: Excursion partagée Eze, Monaco & Monte Carlo from Nice
review_text: Our driver was almost an hour late picking up the last couple joining the tour due to some mix up in the office about pick up location. This put us behind schedule at each planned stop and we we’re very rushed. In fact we missed the charging of the guard at the palace. The driver is a driver and not a guide. He offered little commentary and did not know answers to many questions. When we asked about making up the lost time due to starting late he refused telling us that he had to get back for another group. Very disappointing experience and not worth the money. Terrible customer service.

operator: Excursion partagée Eze, Monaco & Monte Carlo from Nice
review_text: I booked an excursion with French Riviera Trips as a gift for my in-laws, hoping to offer them a nice experience during the holiday. Unfortunately, it was a mistake.On the day of the excursion they showed up on time at the indicated pick-up point, but no one showed up. No calls, no emails, no communication before, during or after.They waited in vain, hoping it was only a delay, but in the end they had to give up, deeply disappointed and bitter.For me it was very embarrassing: I had arranged everything carefully to give them a special gift, and instead it turned into a bad experience. But what struck me most was the total absence of assistance and professionalism from the agency.A mix-up can always happen, but ignoring customers completely is unacceptable. Nobody thought to warn, apologize, or just give explanations.I highly recommend French Riviera Trips to anyone looking for seriousness and respect.A great disappointment, and a wasted opportunity that we will never recover.

operator: Excursion partagée Eze, Monaco & Monte Carlo from Nice
review_text: Monaco, a glamorous city-state on the French Riviera, is renowned for its luxury, casinos, and breathtaking coastal views. The heart of Monaco, **Monte Carlo**, is famous for its world-class casino, high-end shopping, and the prestigious Formula 1 Grand Prix. Visitors can explore the **Prince’s Palace**, and the stunning **Oceanographic Museum**, and enjoy fine dining with spectacular Mediterranean views. Despite its small size, Monaco offers a blend of elegance, history, and modern sophistication. Whether strolling along the **harbor filled with yachts** or experiencing the nightlife, Monaco and Monte Carlo deliver an unforgettable experience of opulence and charm. It's a nice and beautiful place.

operator: Excursion partagée Eze, Monaco & Monte Carlo from Nice
review_text: Our tour guide, Marcos, was awesome!Fantastic communication before pick up, then on the tour day, brilliant local knowledge, stops for photo taking and a great itinerary for our 5 hour tour.Punctual, polite, multi-lingual, could not have been a better way to explore Eze and Monaco.Highly recommend!

operator: Excursion partagée Eze, Monaco & Monte Carlo from Nice
review_text: Fantastic tour hitting all the highlights of the Cote d'Azur. We were picked up along with 6 other travelers in a clean, comfortable new van. Our driver, Parfait, was so welcoming. He really knows the history of the Cote d'Azur and kept us entertained the entire day with his anecdotes and stories. The trip to Eze included a tour of the perfume factory which I never would have done on my own. Other highlights of the trip included the changing of the guard at the palace in Monaco, a brief stop on Monte Carlo, a delightful visit to St. Paul de Vence, seeing the red carpet in Cannes and so much more. I am looking forward to more tours from this company.

operator: 100% Monaco, Beaulieu sur mer and panoramic view from all over Nice
review_text: We loved this visit, Monaco is beautiful and Silvia conveys your story in a very enjoyable and fun way, thanks to it was an excursion that we enjoyed very much and recommend without any doubt. Our favorite part was the palace area and the cathedral, it's a story!

operator: 100% Monaco, Beaulieu sur mer and panoramic view from all over Nice
review_text: Silvia has been an extraordinary guide. You can tell he knows Monaco very well and it is a real pleasure to hear his story. A very entertaining and very pleasant visit. We are delighted. We recommend it!

operator: 100% Monaco, Beaulieu sur mer and panoramic view from all over Nice
review_text: I really enjoyed the tour, visiting the best locations in Monaco.The exotic garden I loved, its views, the greenery, it was beautiful.And the most glamorous places in Monaco, the casino, the cafe Paris.... a dream

operator: Antibes Cannes and St Paul Tour
review_text: Excellent service from David from start to finish. Definitely recommend this trip.

operator: Antibes Cannes and St Paul Tour
review_text: Our guide was super friendly and accommodating. He allowed us to spend time in the places we wanted to. He was informative and clear. The length of the tour was perfect for my son and I. Would recommend this tour

operator: Antibes Cannes and St Paul Tour
review_text: This was exactly what we were looking for traveling with two young kids (ages 1 and 3). The driver ensured we were comfortable the whole time in the van, AC was wonderful on a hot August day and he provided water. Best part, he provided car seats for both kids. Our tour guide was very nice, accommodating and flexible all day. We visited Antibes (had enough time to souvenir shop and get drinks at the plaza) and Saint Paul de Vence (enough time to souvenir shop and have lunch). Because it was just us, we opted out of visiting Cannes which would’ve been a 20 min stop for a photo op. By the time we finished lunch, the kids were ready for a nap so this was the perfect amount of time and trip for a family. Thank you Tengiz for a wonderful time!

operator: Monaco, Monte Carlo & Eze Morning Tour from Nice
review_text: We had a fabulous tour of Nice, Eze, Monaco and Monte Carlo with Sebastian. We were a group of seven and fit very comfortably into his Mercedes Van. Seven people often want different things, but Sebastian was very quick to understand our desires for the tour. He was extremely knowledgeable and had a very fun approach to his explantations. We realized pretty quickly that a half day tour was going to be too short and Sebastian was able to call his manager and convert it to a full day tour very easily.  After the tour, we invited him to sit with us at our hotel for a few minutes. We were discussing our plans for the next day and without a moments hesitation, he offered to show us how to get tickets to the tram and even stayed with us until he was sure we understood exactly what to do. That is going way above and beyond our expectations and was so very appreciated! . We highly recommend this tour and Sebastian.

operator: Monaco, Monte Carlo & Eze Morning Tour from Nice
review_text: Pierre was an awesome guide! Great way to spend half a day.

operator: Monaco, Monte Carlo & Eze Morning Tour from Nice
review_text: Great Tour with an Excellent Guide! ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐We had a wonderful morning exploring Èze, Monaco. The tour was well-organized.Our guide, Fred, was fantastic, friendly, informative! Highly recommend this experience for anyone staying in Nice!

operator: Monaco, Monte Carlo & Eze Morning Tour from Nice
review_text: We were looking for a 1/2 day tour of Eze and Monaco and Valentine certainly delivered.  His main concern was making sure we were happy and being taken care of.  We saw all the sites and more and he was a very good and safe driver.  Great job Valentine.

operator: Monaco, Monte Carlo & Eze Morning Tour from Nice
review_text: Absolutely fantastic!!! I am speechless - nowadays it is rare to meet such a quality of a tour - a fantastic guide Fred, great timing for every part of the route, engaging and exciting story. I do really really recommend!

operator: Monaco, Monte Carlo & Eze Morning Tour from Nice
review_text: Oceane is amazing, I really enjoyed the trip and her welcoming approach and everything! I definitely recommend having your trips with her!

operator: Monaco, Monte Carlo & Eze Morning Tour from Nice
review_text: This was a five hour trip along the coastline up to Eze, Monaco and the Monti Carlo. There were eight guests crammed into a van, all middle aged adults, and one was expected to sit in the middle front with no leg room at all. Guests were generous to play musical chairs for the comfort of others but it was less than ideal and a hot day. The guide was very friendly and knowledgeable, and she explained a lot about the history along the way, which was great! But, she moved with the speed of a rabbit and not the speed of the group. The time spent at the perfumery was interesting but more of a sales pitch, as there was no production to see on a Saturday. I would have much preferred to skip this and have had more time to see Monaco and sites there. The free time at each stop was very rushed and unrealistic and then back into a cramped van that had heated up. It was uncomfortable and tiring overall.

operator: Monaco, Monte Carlo & Eze Morning Tour from Nice
review_text: Valentin was a wonderful tour guide. He navigated the road to Monte Carlo safely and was a wealth of knowledge along the way. We had a great time at Fragonard learning about perfuming. Then on to Monaco! It was a beautiful trip and we learned so much. Highly recommend!

operator: Monaco, Monte Carlo & Eze Morning Tour from Nice
review_text: We enjoyed a full day tour with a visit to Antibes and Canned in the afternoon. Was extremely impressed by the knowledge and professionalism of our tour guide, Oceane. She guided us effortlessly through multiple cities while patiently and expertly making each city come alive. We visited the best photo stops and never really felt hurried though we covered a lot of territory. My husband and I would enthusiastically recommend this tour company. A great value and memories to treasure for a lifetime!

operator: Monaco, Monte Carlo & Eze Morning Tour from Nice
review_text: Caroline was a wonderful tour guide! She was very friendly and knowledgeable and kept the group informed with history and landmarks!! The tour was great, our only recommendation would be to allow for more stops for pictures as the views and scenery are amazing! The highlight of the trip was Eze village and Monte Carlo!!

operator: Monaco, Monte Carlo & Eze Morning Tour from Nice
review_text: Wonderful tour! Fred was such a great guide. He listened to what we wanted to see and helped to ensure the specific spots were pointed out during the tour.  We loved our time in Monaco.  The area is just stunning and so beautifully kept. Wish we had more time to spend there. This is a tour that is worth taking. Especially, if this is your first time in the area.

operator: Monaco, Monte Carlo & Eze Morning Tour from Nice
review_text: Our guide, Anthony, was wonderful. Very informative and patient. Bring a snack. You’re not in any area for very long. Comfortable ride

operator: Monaco, Monte Carlo & Eze Morning Tour from Nice
review_text: Anthony was absolutely amazing in every way! I appreciated his energy, enthusiasm, and depth of knowledge. He brought the perfect blend of professionalism and relaxed southern France charm, making our drive through the French Riviera unforgettable.

operator: Monaco, Monte Carlo & Eze Morning Tour from Nice
review_text: Really enjoyed our trip. Our driver/guide was very knowledgable. Enjoyed the stops and view points and 2 hours in Monaco was great.Would definitely recommend

operator: Monaco, Monte Carlo & Eze Morning Tour from Nice
review_text: The tour was very informative and enjoyable. We saw some breathtaking views and explored the most important sites in the area. Our tour guide, Thalis, was very friendly and knowledgeable. Highly recommended tour, especially if you don’t have much time but would still like to explore the main attractions in Monaco and Eze.

operator: Monaco, Monte Carlo & Eze Morning Tour from Nice
review_text: Anthony was an amazing guide! We booked a small group tour and it ended up just being the two of us on our own private tour. Anthony was super knowledgeable and would recommend anyone doing this tour. We went to Monaco and Eze for half a day tour and that was the perfect amount of time. I think a full day would have been too much.

operator: Monaco, Monte Carlo & Eze Morning Tour from Nice
review_text: I 100% recommend this tour! I enjoyed absolutely everything from beginning to end. Our guide Thomas was amazing, very knowledgeable and he clearly loves his region. Each place we visited was stunning and unique. 10 out of 10!

operator: Monaco, Monte Carlo & Eze Morning Tour from Nice
review_text: We are delighted with the experience. It is a great tour. The best for us was our guide, Harmonie. She was fantastic, kind and funny with a lot of knowledge. We had a lovely day.

operator: Monaco, Monte Carlo & Eze Morning Tour from Nice
review_text: Caroline is an amazing guide ! She is polite and professional and has a very strong historical knowledge of the area. She gave us plenty of time to look around and take pictures and even offered to take pictures for us. She just made the whole trip fun and answered all the questions we had in mind. Thank you Caroline . We will definitely choose A La Francaise as our preferred company and will definitely ask for Caroline !!

operator: Monaco, Monte Carlo & Eze Morning Tour from Nice
review_text: Our guide Harmonie, was amazing!! Very pleasant, and knowledgeable about the locations we experienced.  We love learning about the history of the places we travel to, and she did Amazing.  Definitely would recommend this tour, it was beautiful.

operator: Monaco, Monte Carlo & Eze Morning Tour from Nice
review_text: This was a great tour and our host, Thalis, was wonderful. She was full of information. We lucked out in that none the others that booked showed up, so we basically had a private tour. Treat yourself to something memorable.

operator: Monaco, Monte Carlo & Eze Morning Tour from Nice
review_text: We took the half-day trip from Nice to Èze and Monaco in June/2024 with our guide Harmonie. She was very knowledgeable and provided valuable recommendations for us. The half-day excursion gave us enough time to see the main points and walk around Èze and Monaco. Would recommend this excursion option for someone who wanted to visit around Nice and still have time to go to the beach afterwards.

operator: Monaco, Monte Carlo & Eze Morning Tour from Nice
review_text: We had an amazing time with our tour guide Magdalena! She was very knowledgeable and gave us a great tour throughout the cute village of Eze. We also had a nice lunch overlooking the harbor in Montecarlo. It was the perfect day trip from Nice! 10/10 would recommend.

operator: Monaco, Monte Carlo & Eze Morning Tour from Nice
review_text: Thalis was our tour guide. She was incredible!! She picked us up on time in the morning. Her English was excellent . She is so knowledgeable about the places we went to. I learned so much from her. I soaked up all the history that she shared with my husband and I the entire day. She went out of her way to make us feel comfortable. The entire day was amazing. As a surprise at the end of the tour she took us to a chocolatier that made all their chocolates by hand. I felt she explored right along with us. You would be very fortunate to get her as your guide.

operator: Monaco, Monte Carlo & Eze Morning Tour from Nice
review_text: Certainly a memorable experience for the both of us. We had an amazing morning with our tour guide, who knew all about the French Rivièra

operator: Monaco, Monte Carlo & Eze Morning Tour from Nice
review_text: Our Driver Magdalene took the time to make sure we saw views of nice and Monaco from great viewpoint! She was patient and knowledgeable and made the experience very nice

operator: Monaco, Monte Carlo & Eze Morning Tour from Nice
review_text: My family and I had such a great time! Our tour guide, Thalis, was so knowledgeable and took us to the most beautiful spots in Monte Carlo and Eze. Would definitely recommend.

operator: Monaco, Monte Carlo & Eze Morning Tour from Nice
review_text: Harmonie was our tour guide, and we love her! She made us feel so comfortable and welcome. Our tour took the perfect amount of time in each stop, and we never felt rushed. She tailored our tour to our wants instead of sticking to a struck schedule. She knew a lot about the region and culture and gave us recommendations on dinner, bakeries, and gelato. We would recommend her to anyone and she did an amazing job! We want to go with her again!

operator: Monaco, Monte Carlo & Eze Morning Tour from Nice
review_text: Our trip guide tried to make it a nice tour despite having a couple rude people. She went above and beyond

operator: Monaco, Monte Carlo & Eze Morning Tour from Nice
review_text: The tour was nothing short of outstanding.   Our tour guide, Harmonie, was absolutely fantastic.  She picked the three of us up at our hotel right on time and began the car tour from Cannes to Monaco with a very friendly greeting and a brief overview of what we could expect in the next 8 hours!  We were comfortable with her and knew we had a great guide from the first moments of the trip.  We stopped along the road to take in breathtaking scenes and arrived in Monaco right on time to see the changing of the guards.  Strolling, shopping, eating,  a drive along part of the race route and a wonderful tour of the oceanographic Museum made up one of the best tours of our trip!  Harmonie had us back to the hotel right on schedule!  We highly recommend this tour and our wonderful tour guide, Harmonie

operator: Monaco, Monte Carlo & Eze Morning Tour from Nice
review_text: Magdalena was amazing. Her knowledge of the south of France and engagement with our teenage daughters made it the perfect family trip. Her English is fantastic and she is a joy to be around. We will be coming back for sure

operator: Monaco, Monte Carlo & Eze Morning Tour from Nice
review_text: Thank you A la Francaise for the amazing tour on the Côte d’Azur! We had a wonderful day, the guide made us discover the best spots and was super kind. I highly recommend to any person willing to make the best of his/her trip in the region.

operator: Provencal Market and Wine Tasting Full Day Shared Tour from Nice
review_text: Nicole was our guide through this experience very friendly and made sure to give us all the history facts! Also gave us tips on where to eat!

operator: Citroen Mehari Tour of Beaches, Villages and Lovely Views
review_text: Fabio was flexible and quickly found what we were interested in and adapted the itinerary accordingly. The Citron was fun and a great way to see the great scenery. If you can, make this part of your trip. You will not regret it!Rick & KathyNC, USA

operator: Citroen Mehari Tour of Beaches, Villages and Lovely Views
review_text: We enjoyed a fabulous few hours with Fabio in the vintage Citron touring around the South of France. He took us high up to visit Eze village. We had 45 mins to walk around the lovely cobbled streets, visit the artisan shops and feel as though we’d gone back in time. Very picturesque. There is also a tropical garden there but it was rather busy so we decided not to visit in the time we had allocated. Fabio amended the trip for us so instead of drive around Monaco (we had already visited) he kindly offered us a tour around the coastal route to Saint-Jean-Cap-Ferrat. We then enjoyed a lovely walk along the scenic coastal promenade to the beach and marina. A very peaceful area as away from the main tourist areas due to there being no direct train access. Fabio stopped at key view points around the tour for us to take photos. His English is perfect so he could give us lots of local information plus answer any questions we had. Fabio was very friendly and took good care of us, particularly entering and exiting the vehicle as it’s quite tight and we’re not so agile anymore (retired) He also provided drinks too, even wine! We highly recommend this experience

operator: Citroen Mehari Tour of Beaches, Villages and Lovely Views
review_text: This was truly an unforgettable experience. This tour was an excellent way to see a variety of stunning locations and breathtaking views that the Rivera has to offer. What stood out the most was how personalised the experience was; it felt like nothing was too much trouble for our guide, Fabio.From the moment we started, Fabio made us feel at ease. His extensive knowledge about the area and its history was impressive, and his patience made the journey enjoyable. It genuinely felt like we were travelling with a friend rather than just a tour guide. The refreshments along the way were a lovely, unexpected extra touch.I would not hesitate to book this tour again and wholeheartedly recommend it to others. If you’re looking for a fantastic way to explore the Rivera with a knowledgeable and friendly guide, this is the tour for you!

operator: Citroen Mehari Tour of Beaches, Villages and Lovely Views
review_text: Beautiful day with hair in the wind in the Méhari 😍 we loved to crisscross the narrow streets to admire the beautiful scenery and take photos! Fabio treated us with care and knew how to please us by adapting the tour according to our desires. I recommend everyone to live this experience 👌 thank you again!

operator: Citroen Mehari Tour of Beaches, Villages and Lovely Views
review_text: Very good visitAttentive and very pleasant guideGives us time to take breaks to visit during the route

operator: Citroen Mehari Tour of Beaches, Villages and Lovely Views
review_text: My first time in the French riviera, I was able to see so much thanks to Mr Fabio. I was able to cover a few cities in one day with amazing views

operator: Citroen Mehari Tour of Beaches, Villages and Lovely Views
review_text: Fabio was very friendly and kind, he made a couple of recommendations that we would have missed, but thanks to his knowledge about the city and the coast. We got more than we bargained for.Thanks Fabio

operator: French Riviera Cannes, Monaco & More shared guided tour from Nice
review_text: Thank you very much to Joel we attended very well and the great food if we return to Tarragona we will not hesitate to go and recommend it

operator: French Riviera Cannes, Monaco & More shared guided tour from Nice
review_text: It was an awesome trip with beautiful and stunning views. Best was to see the surrounding cities of Nice. Thank you for the experience!

operator: French Riviera Cannes, Monaco & More shared guided tour from Nice
review_text: Every time I stayed here . I was really happy because everyone was friendly and the service was excellent….. the people were super niceRoom is always cleanThe guy Angel he super nice and I’ll be back here few more days later…… I’ll keep good reviews

operator: French Riviera Cannes, Monaco & More shared guided tour from Nice
review_text: Our guide, Nicholas was great. We were picked up at our hotel right on time. He kept things on schedule. We were in an 8 passenger van that had French, Spanish and English speaking passengers and he managed to provide all commentary in all languages. He covered a lot of interesting facts and history and answered all our questions. Most stops were fairly short, but we were able to cover a lot of ground a get  a bit of the flavour of each place.

operator: French Riviera Cannes, Monaco & More shared guided tour from Nice
review_text: The French Riviera tour was a great start of the visit to the the south of France.  From spectacular views to french craftsmanship, our guide Jackelyn was very articulate and knowledgeable of the area and the manufacturing companies for scents.Would recommend anyone for it's breath taking views to the production and distribution of french scents..

operator: French Riviera Cannes, Monaco & More shared guided tour from Nice
review_text: Great guide and a great tour. If you have time, it would be better to visit each place individually, but if your time is limited, this is a great way to see a lot in one day.

operator: French Riviera Cannes, Monaco & More shared guided tour from Nice
review_text: Very fine Sea Food restsurant , very fine cussine thanks to Fabio , luegio and the high class cheff . We had very nice time and a vary vary tasty Sea Food . One of the best in Civitavecchia

operator: French Riviera Cannes, Monaco & More shared guided tour from Nice
review_text: Nova was a great person to guide you through the entire trip. Lots of jokes and well explained all the details.Good Job.

operator: French Riviera Cannes, Monaco & More shared guided tour from Nice
review_text: Even though it was raining most of the day, and the Cannes Festival was on with people everywhere, road blockages etc, we managed to still see everything.  It was a great tour incorporating lots of places.  Our driver was amazing through some trying times with the road blockages and was very knowledgeable.  We drove to Antibes, Cannes, Eze, Monaco and had time to wander around to see things.  Would recommend.

operator: French Riviera Cannes, Monaco & More shared guided tour from Nice
review_text: Canceled my tours, not just one but two, they did so less than 24 hours in advanced so I couldn’t booked with another companyDo yourself a favor and book with someone else, this company it’s not serious at all, they just don’t care.

operator: French Riviera Cannes, Monaco & More shared guided tour from Nice
review_text: This tour was amazing! We got to see so much in one day. The little villages were so quaint and  our tour guide, Maria, was so knowledgeable. I  would definitely recommend this tour!

operator: French Riviera Cannes, Monaco & More shared guided tour from Nice
review_text: This was amazing!  My family for four (2 teenage boys) did this and it was one of our most favourite days in France!  The spots and time spend at each spot was perfect. Our guide, I hate to admit but I forget his name but I believe it was Justin, made our experience so memorable. He was very entertaining and informative. We have such amazing pictures and memories from this tour. I highly recommend this and it was worth every penny.

operator: French Riviera Cannes, Monaco & More shared guided tour from Nice
review_text: We took a six person tour under the guidance of FX (Francisco Xavier). The nine hour tour was fabulous. FX shared his knowledge of Nice, Monaco and Cannes. He was polite, courteous and a great guy to spend the day with. We highly recommend Smartour Riviera and FX as its guide. 👍

operator: French Riviera Cannes, Monaco & More shared guided tour from Nice
review_text: We covered a lot in one day!  We loved getting into St Paul de Vence early before the crowds.  Each stop was a little different and had so much to see!  We liked stopping in Cannes for lunch and enjoyed the beach there.  Our Driver/Guide was helpful and informative (he did a great job speaking in French and English)  Well worth the money!

operator: French Riviera Cannes, Monaco & More shared guided tour from Nice
review_text: The boutique shops are impressive.  The grand hotels magnificent.  The water on a sunny day inviting. The stroll down the shops side and back along the beach side is enjoyable.

operator: French Riviera Cannes, Monaco & More shared guided tour from Nice
review_text: Francis Xavier is a fantastic tour guide, interesting, knowledgeable, entertaining. We never felt rushed, even though this tour covers a lot of places. The scenery and villages were beautiful. However, Viator’s description needs to tell travelers that every stop except Monaco and Cannes requires them to climb steep village streets. I called Viator before booking this tour and explained that I am disabled, I can walk, but I cannot climb uphill. Viator incorrectly told me that there is walking but no climbing uphill.

operator: French Riviera Cannes, Monaco & More shared guided tour from Nice
review_text: You get to see a lot more of South of France in a confortable and adequate pace.Our driver/guide was quite the informative type while being comical and easy going.  Learned a lot of trivia from this day tour.  The van was comfortable as well.

operator: French Riviera Cannes, Monaco & More shared guided tour from Nice
review_text: I guess we were there in the midst of their vacation period of summer.  It was very crowded and felt like we were all herded around like cattle as you see crowds and crowds of people.  It was hard to leisurely stroll and take in the essence of being in Monte Carlo or to have time to sit in the lobby of the grand Casino.  There were lines for the restrooms, lines to take photos, lines to get into buildings, lines to get out of buildings!  Hectic!  Well, I guess this is how they prosper with the visitors from the cruise ships being bus loaded in and overcrowding the streets with taxis and traffic everywhere!

operator: French Riviera Cannes, Monaco & More shared guided tour from Nice
review_text: Wonderful tour which started with a pickup on time. Our guide was amazing with full of knowledge and a wonderful driver, he made sure that we got enough time at each location to visit the places that we should! Covered almost all the places starting from Antibes -> Cannes -> Saint Paul[Beautiful town] -> Monaco -> Eze.It was very well managed and planned. I recommend the tour to anyone who just want to spend a day and visit such lovely places.

operator: French Riviera Cannes, Monaco & More shared guided tour from Nice
review_text: We had an amazing time on our holiday in Nice, the weather was perfect. We met our tour guide at our hotel and she was lovely. I can't remember her name, so sorry. She took us to all the main sites and she was honest about everything and gave us lots of hints and tips. I would recommend this trip to everyone. It was worth every moment. There was no way my husband and I could have done it all alone and the fact that it was all in one day we enjoyed as it gave us the rest of the holiday to enjoy the city.

operator: French Riviera Cannes, Monaco & More shared guided tour from Nice
review_text: Along the Mediterannean, into the hilgh country behind -  vistas of mountains, glamorous neighbourhoods and cities, and the sea.  Breathtaking views.  Leaving from Nice, no suitcases, and collected at the hotel.  Safe, personable and courteous tour guide/ driver who was able to navigate the area well, detouring where necessary while maximising the scenic views.  The stops were well chosen and the duration adequate to get a sense of place.  The narrative was knowledgeable, giving a historical, geographical and social background as applicable. A wonderful full day experience ending with a perfume experience.

operator: French Riviera Cannes, Monaco & More shared guided tour from Nice
review_text: We signed up for this tour because we wanted to visit Monaco AND the rest of the sites on this tour sounded interesting. We did enjoy Monaco although our tour guides' historical knowledge was twisted and inaccurate. IE, the Grimaldis of Monaco came from Genoa Italy but were not Italian (not true, they were Italian); Rome was under French control until 1871 (not true, it was part of the Papal States and under the control of the Vatican). Oh, well. Our driver (I think his name was Leo) dropped us off in Monaco and met us an hour later. We enjoyed walking to the palace and seeing the church where Princess Grace was wed. Back in the van we were driven to Eze, and a perfume factory. Including this sham in the tour is downright stupid. The six Americans on the tour refused to go in while the two Argentines took the tour. After this the driver took us to a hill at the base of Eze and gave us twenty minutes to walk to the top, look around and walk back down. Once again, only the Argentines complied. We returned to Nice where the other four Americans left the tour, and after an hour for lunch on our own, we rejoined Leo with the Argentines to drive to Cannes and Antibes. Driver Leo apparently liked speaking Spanish more than English and gabbed constantly in Spanish to the Argentine couple while we sat isolated in the back of the van. Once again he dropped us off in Cannes, gave us a two minute narrative on the film festival then met us an hour later. We drove through Antibes and its supposed billion dollar yachts but we didn't follow the Spanish narrative. From there we went to Saint Paul de Vence where we were given a brief overview of its history then sent into the town on our own for an hour. It's a neat little town on the top of a hill with a beautiful view of the countryside. The historical nature of the town is lost in all of the commercial ventures that occupy it. It felt more like a Disney land shopping area than a historic French village. I wish I had researched a way to do this on our own.

operator: French Riviera Cannes, Monaco & More shared guided tour from Nice
review_text: We were a group of 10 and struggled to find a van/minibus that would fit all of us, and we had very specific plans of what we wanted to do. We came across Smartour and they were perfect and accommodated us and all of our questions, with many different plan changes on our part. We asked for special trips, and Tony, our driver and tour guide, did exactly as we wanted to do. He even changed are the size of our van on one of the days and switched our destination day of upon request when the weather wasn't great. Tony was so knowledgeable, kind, and helpful, and I would recommend him to everyone. We had an amazing two days, visiting the Gorges du Verdon, Eze, Monaco, Monte-Carlo, and Menton. I highly recommend Smartour, as we had an incredible experience. Worth every euro.

operator: French Riviera Cannes, Monaco & More shared guided tour from Nice
review_text: A great option for people that really want to meet the best of the French Riviera. I recommend it to couples, families and everyone that want to meet the greatest places around Nice. Anthony, our guide, was incredibly kind and explained us a lot of details of every place we´ve visited. Great experience even in the winter!

operator: Cannes, Grasse, Gourdon, & Saint-Paul-de-Vence /Day Trip
review_text: Great guide and wonderful trip!! It was a good experience seeing the notable mideaval villages, the Provence Alps, the classic french parfumerie Fragonard and the environment where of flower and fruit fragrances florish naturally.

operator: Cannes, Grasse, Gourdon, & Saint-Paul-de-Vence /Day Trip
review_text: Had a great wonderful experience ❤️ definitely LOVE all the locations included in this tour. I wanted to touch on everything i haven’t been and this tour just served this purpose perfectly. I also amazingly found my soul perfume in Gourdon. ❤️

operator: Cannes, Grasse, Gourdon, & Saint-Paul-de-Vence /Day Trip
review_text: What a wonderful dayThank you  for the great organization and thank you to our tour guide who was so knowledgable and amazing

operator: Cannes, Grasse, Gourdon, & Saint-Paul-de-Vence /Day Trip
review_text: This was a great trip.  We visited 3 lovely mountain villages and sea towns of Antibes and Canne and had just the right amount of time at each. Our guide, Placido was very nice, knowledgeable and knew all the best places to pull over for photos, etc.  Also had a short tour at the Fragonard factory which I found very interesting.  Definitely a great tour to get a taste of Provence.

operator: Cannes, Grasse, Gourdon, & Saint-Paul-de-Vence /Day Trip
review_text: On the website, they call this their Countryside Tour, which led me to believe that we would have a guide taking us through the small villages we planned to see. However, there was no guide, just a driver who brought us from one village to the next and then waited while we walked around. I spoke with some others on my tour and they had been under the same impression. Despite the lack of guide, I had a nice day exploring the small streets in Grasse, St. Paul, and Gourdon on my own, doing some shopping and eating. However, if someone is truly looking for a tour guide to take them through the villages, I recommend you look elsewhere.

operator: Ferry from Nice to the Island Sainte Marguerite
review_text: Having made this crossing several times with trans Côte d’Azur, I can say that the quality is always on the appointment. Punctuality, cleanliness and comfort in forgetting Service. For this last crossing we tried the new Catamaran Héloïse, impressive! Great comfort on board and very good stability. Good luck with it.

operator: Ferry from Nice to the Island Sainte Marguerite
review_text: no information was given as to what is going to happen and what to expect. nothing much is in the Ile. really a waist of time even the people that serve you a coffer in the Ile are so angry .the experience is just not for a couple its good for young kids just not a luxury and not for a couple.

operator: Ferry from Nice to the Island Sainte Marguerite
review_text: Cruise was cancelled without any reason. When we went to get refund (5th July,2018, around 5-30pm at QUAI LUNEL, Nice) the lady at the counter was so rude, unprofessional and condescending.We were not there for a free trip. The cruise was cancelled by you WITHOUT ANY REASON CITED TO US!! The least we could expect was courteous behavior.I have no words to describe how sour a taste, this whole experience left me with.

operator: Flavors & Tastes of Provence , Shared & Guided 1/2 Day from Nice
review_text: Giuseppe took us on a wonderful journey to a world outside of Nice. The drive was a little scary (curvy as he would say) but that just added to the thrill. We were able to make a few photo stops and spend time in a little artsy town on a hill.

operator: Flavors & Tastes of Provence , Shared & Guided 1/2 Day from Nice
review_text: My wife and I have come up with a number of titles for a Trip Advisor review of today’s tour.  The brochure promised “Flavors & Tastes of Provence.”  Well, we had an adventure but not the one we’d envisioned.   The titles we settled on are “Smartour = Not So Smart” or “Six-hour Taxi Ride” or “Smiley and her tour from hell.”The tour was supposed to start at 1:00 and last five hours.  To the company’s credit, someone did call us to apprise us of a late arrival (1:30) due to traffic.  Ok.  We waited patiently.  When our tour guide (Smiley) arrived at 1:45, we discovered that we needed to drop off two visitors, a mother and daughter, from the morning tour.  That took one hour as the two were outside Nice, and then we had to backtrack through Nice simply to begin OUR tour.  When we arrived at the first of four designated stops, Saint-Paul de Vence, Smiley dropped us off for 40 minutes and went to pick up someone.  What?  After almost two hours in the van, we both had to go to the bathroom, so our first visit was to the tourist office to locate a toilet.  Then we had time to share an ice cream cone and take a few pictures.  Saddened that we didn’t have time to enjoy a meal or to explore this charming city, we returned to the designated pick-up spot at 4:00.  Smiley was a few minutes late.  We were joined in our van by two other travelers, a lovely South Korean couple, who had been dropped off in Saint-Paul de Vence when Smiley had returned to Nice to pick us up, return the mother and daughter to their hotel, and whatever else she might have done.  The woman complained that they’d had FOUR hours in Saint-Paul de Vence.  She and her husband had too much time while we didn’t have enough.  She asked Smiley to help her call and cancel a dinner reservation at 7:30 as they wouldn’t get home in time.  As it was late and had started to rain, I told Smiley that we were ok to return early but that we’d need to have a discounted rate if we couldn’t visit the four destinations advertised in the tour.  The designated route for the tour was supposed to be Saint-Paul de Vence to Tourettes-Sur-Loup to Gourdon to Grasse.  After calling her manager, Smiley announced that we could visit all destinations.  We proceeded in silence; the rain was torrential at this point.Smiley shuffled the schedule (to Grasse next!) to catch the perfume factory before it closed.  Helene (our tour guide at the factory) was good.  She gave us a 20-minute tour, but we weren’t so interested in perfume; we were more interested in seeing historic architectural treasures.When we got to Gourdon, Smiley gave us 30 minutes.  My wife and I along with our fellow travelers disembarked from the van, armed with umbrellas.  It felt apocalyptic with the dark sky and the rain pelting us at every step.  It was very cold, and when our umbrella turned inside out, my wife screamed.  This was not the last time that four-letter words flew.  Two crystal stores were open; nothing else.  We couldn’t get any food or drink; after we snapped a few pictures, all four of us returned to the van early.We proceeded to Tourettes-Sur-Loup.  Smiley asked if we’d like time to get out and look around.  We asked if anything would be open.  NO.  We snapped a few pictures and agreed to return to Nice.We arrived home two hours late.  We had spent the majority of our time in the van—not out visiting.  We don’t blame Smiley.  Aside from the inclement weather and traffic, we blame Smiley’s manager who tried to combine half-day tours with full-day tours with some airport transports thrown in.  Whose dumb idea was that?  It didn’t work for us, and we’ll tell anyone we know to avoid Smartours because—based on our experience—they’re pretty dumb.

operator: Countryside Tour
review_text: Right in advance: the landscape tour is a beautiful excursion. We visited Grasse (including guided tour at Fragonard), Gourdon, the Gorges du Loup waterfall and the beautiful St Paul-de-Vence. We had a great, German-speaking guide with Yorgos and felt very comfortable! We would give the full score for that.There is a point deduction for communication with the organizer "French-Riviera-Sightseeing". After several questions about the meeting place (without answer!), a rather cheeky and pampering message came in the late evening. Since we had an AirBnB apartment in the old town, we couldn't name a hotel to pick up and just wanted to find out an alternative meeting point. Here we only got a meeting point after repeated questions. The type of communication is in urgent need of improvement !In the end everything went well and we had an unforgettable afternoon with Yorgos!

operator: Countryside Tour
review_text: There was too little time in each place, but otherwise the guide was mega cute and pleasant. We were very happy with the day and had a good experience

operator: Countryside Tour
review_text: I booked 15 days before and received confirmation of booking with pick up the correct address the day before the experience. On the day of the trip we introduced ourselves, 3 people, at the correct address about 15 minutes before the agreed time, we waited almost an hour but no one showed up to pick us up. I made dozens of calls, but it was always going to voicemail. Trip not made. The tour operator did not even send me an SMS or Whatsapp to tell me that the trip would not take place. An afternoon of vacation completely lost. Zero seriousness. I did get my refund from Tripadvisor, though.

operator: Countryside Tour
review_text: Same as for so many others:-we showed up 30min before pickup, then-no show-no message-no phone answeredI wonder why...

operator: Countryside Tour
review_text: Tour wasn’t available on date of booking. No response about refund. Stopped responding to messages. Based on the reviews from other people on here, I’m shocked Tripadvisor still allow it to use its platform.

operator: Countryside Tour
review_text: Fantastic tour Jaba was a great driver and very informative really enjoyed it. Took his time with us explaining history of areas and telling us useful information

operator: Countryside Tour
review_text: They didn't turn up, even though they confirmed the pickup location the night before.  No further communication from them despite several attempts on my part.  Very disappointed and very unimpressed.

operator: Countryside Tour
review_text: I would give zero stars if I could. I booked the afternoon tour for two on August 12. The day before, I received confirmation that we would be picked up from our hotel at 2:00 PM. We were back at the hotel by 1:00 PM and I even informed reception that we were expecting a pickup for a tour. At 1:50 PM we waited outside, but nobody showed up.At 2:05 PM I sent a message to the tour operator saying we were outside waiting—no reply. I tried calling them, but nobody answered. I then contacted Viator (since I had booked through them), and even they couldn’t reach the operator. We kept waiting until after 2:30 PM, but no one ever came.I requested a refund, but the operator refused without any explanation. Our plans were ruined, and we missed the chance to see Grasse and the mountain villages. It left us frustrated and disappointed, turning what should have been a wonderful vacation memory into a bitter experience.I’ve traveled to over 50 countries across 4 continents and taken countless tours with local operators—this is the first time I’ve encountered such unprofessional behavior. Avoid French Riviera Sightseeing at all costs!

operator: Countryside Tour
review_text: A perfect afternoon exploring the French Countryside. Nicole was very knowledgeable about each historic village and each castle. She was patient and even stopped per our request to give us a chance to take a photo of the outside view of Gourdon.  She provided tips along the tour as well stories about each of the historic mideivel villages we visited.We traveled with 2 kids who enjoyed the tour. So much to learn from food, culture and history!We were a bit hesitant about the time and how long the tour was and it was a perfect amount of time to visit, view and explore (to maximize your visit since stops are shorter in duration , I would recommend eating before the trip)

operator: Countryside Tour
review_text: David was the best tour guide!! We went to the little old city town with restaurants and stores and then went on a wine tour where we tried many wines and chocolates. Overall a great experience and I would definitely recommend it!!

operator: Countryside Tour
review_text: The towns were very pretty and our guide was knowledgeable about what was around us at the time. He also gave us suggestions of where to eat in Nice.If you get the chance, do the tour in the morning if you do it late in the year. Sun sets early this time of the year. It was very nice to see the town of Tourettes sur Loup after dark with the Christmas lights on

operator: Countryside Tour
review_text: Really good trip to the villages. Amazing views and very interesting.We were able to take some great photos. Our guide and driver excellent

operator: Countryside Tour
review_text: The most stunning views! Our tour guide was hilarious, so sweet and thoughtful. She gave us restaurant and area tips. I hope the tour company sees this and gives her a raise 🙃

operator: Countryside Tour
review_text: We had a fantastic trip into the hills around Nice , the driver Parfait was excellent, the small group of 7 people worked well, very friendly

operator: Countryside Tour
review_text: Great experience. Our guide, Roman, told great little stories about the beautiful villages.  He would drive awhile, then start us with a little story or information about the beautiful place, then allow plenty of free time for exploration, then drive again, etc.

operator: Countryside Tour
review_text: A very enjoyable trip, with our guide, George. We covered a lot of the countryside which was stunningly beautiful. We learned about each site and George contributed some local history as well.

operator: Countryside Tour
review_text: Stunning views, beautiful villages, we wished to have more time to spend there. Our driver Doto was very funny and friendly, drove us at the lower speed up in the mountains. Is not good for people who are scared of heights but I don’t regret the experience.

operator: Countryside Tour
review_text: The tour to Grasse and the countryside was spectacular. The scenery was absolutely beautiful. Be sure to ask your tour guide to take you through old town Grasse to see all the pink umbrellas.

operator: Countryside Tour
review_text: Amazing tour. This tour will bring you to places which will make you feel as if you are in some fairytale land. Definitely not to be missed if you are in French Riveria  rather visit to French Riveria so that you can see these places.

operator: Countryside Tour
review_text: Calling it a tour is a stretch as our driver never provided information about what we were seeing. He acted more like he didn't want to be there. I would describe it as a taxi service that included these locations. Granted the driving was challenging and he did have to pay attention to that.  He needed lots more training or better yet, another career.Expectations must be kept low, but it did get us into the countryside which we could have not done ourselves. That's the most positive description I can give of the experience. I would not trust any tour provided by French Riviera Touring.

operator: Countryside Tour
review_text: Giving this excursion 3 is being generous.  First of all, our tour guide seemed to be in a rush from the start.  I was picked up on time, however the first three stops were for, at most, 10 minutes a piece.  This was NOT a countryside tour, but a mountainside tour.  The guide drove VERY fast along the Alps' mountainside; so fast I texted my family back home telling them so and I loved them.  The guide also did not give very much detail about the places we visited. I had taken a different trip the day before and visited the first and last places then.  I ended up telling the other people on the trip about what I had learned the day before!  I should have been the paid guide.  Also, this was NOT a half day tour - it was 4 hours, advertised as 6!  Will not use this travel company again. The guide's name was Jacques (Jack).

operator: Countryside Tour
review_text: Nobody picked me up at my hotel, I missed the entire tour yesterday.  No email, text or call.  I am very angry with French Riviera Services and will be applying for a refund.

operator: Countryside Tour
review_text: They didn’t show up. They didn’t call. We waited 45 minutes. Only when we called did we find out, supposedly, they were at the wrong place. Wretched experience.

operator: Countryside Tour
review_text: The company is one big scam!They have contacted me on the day of the tour that they cannot provide it and it needs to be moved. After agreeing upon new date and confirming pick up place, I have never heard from them again. I tried to contact them several times on the day and the following days too, via call and text, but they never got back to me and have rejected refund requests.They have stolen 150€ and disappeared. It is one big scam managed by thieves!

operator: Countryside Tour
review_text: Scammers and thieves!! Booked a tour with them, paid 150eur. They call on the day of the tour to move it even though we booked it at an available slot. Then on the new day we agree upon they don't show up. We have called over and over again, sent emails and messages, but we are being ghosted.They litterally ran away with our money and made sure they would never pick up the phone when we rang. Scam, scam, scam, don't ever book with them

operator: Countryside Tour
review_text: I enjoyed this tour very much.  However, there were to many stops in half-day tour and not enough time in each place

operator: Countryside Tour
review_text: My wife, who works in the perfume industry, absolutely wanted to pass through this village. I followed her, I also loved it

operator: Countryside Tour
review_text: Hugely disappointed with this tour. Nothing like described.  The itinerary under what to expect said one hour in Grasse, discover Grasse.  The whole time was spent in the perfume factory.  Next it said one hour in Gourdon. We got 20 minutes there.  Next was Tourrettes.  Supposed to be there for one hour. Spent 10 minutes at the underwhelming waterfall then a quick drive through Tourretttes without stopping.  Last on the itinerary was St. Paul de Vence.  Supposed to be there for 1 hour 30 minutes.  We had 50 minutes there but arrived as all the stores were closing.  Also listed under inclusions was professional guide.  Theo was very nice but definitely not a professional guide. Bottled water, we had to ask for it and we’re offered warm bottles from the trunk of the car.  WiFi on board, NOT.In addition it took many weeks and multiple emails to get any response to my request to set a pick up location.If this is an example of your tours, I definitely won’t be taking any in the future.

operator: Countryside Tour
review_text: Really glad we did this tour, it took you to towns and villages you maybe wouldn't usually see on a trip to Nice. Our driver picked us up from our hotel at the time arranged. The car was very clean we were picked up in and the driver was friendly. We visited Grasse, Gourdon, the waterfall at Gorges du Loup and St Paul de Vence. The perfume factory tour in Grasse was included as part of the trip.

operator: Countryside Tour
review_text: Tour included: Grasse, Gourdon, Tourettes-sur-Loup, St Paul de Vence.  Beautiful countryside villages; spectacular scenery; history and markets.  A contrast from the city.I was lucky to be in a small group of 3 so the coordination was easy and the trip was structured towards our preference.  Nordine, driver.guide was excellent.Hotel pickup was very convenient. Good time managment.

operator: Countryside Tour
review_text: Parfait was a wonderful guide. Extremely personable and very knowledgeable. He was very attentive and kind throughout. Perfect manners. Great guide and would definitely go on tour with him again . 5 out of 5 for Parfait.Slight setback due to office not clearly confirming pick up point despite phoning in advance.

operator: Countryside Tour
review_text: We had a great time! Lionel was very knowledgeable and funny which made the long drives pass by quickly and the villages we visited were each beautiful and unique. Overall we definitely recommend.

operator: Countryside Tour
review_text: DO NOT book these scam artists!!We had just booked this the night before we were supposed to go. Pickup happened at the designated time the next morning. There were 2 vans and one couple from Holland were already in the vehicle when we got in. Our driver did not speak English. The other driver told us we were to pick up 10 more people. FineWe got to the hotel where the group of 10 were and waited about 5 minutes. The english-speaking driver came back to let us know that only 8 were coming since 2 of the group were sick. At that point we did not want to travel with possibly infected covid travelers (they were all the same group afterall). So we got out of the vehicle and walked the mile and half or so to our hotel. On the way, I called their office and was told we would get a refund.Not so! Booked through VIator, I made a dispute through them and they were NO HELP!1. They said the provider told them we didn't want to get in the vehicle with others! **We had already taken other day trips with others through viator.2. They said they checked pass sanitaire! **They DID NOT! And even if they had we did not want to be in close proximity in a vehicle for hours to people who were exposed to the virus!! We needed to test negative to fly back home.3. They said they would refund, they did not!!We had just booked and they pretty much STOLE our money.This is copied from the gorges and lavender tour.... their response was that we wanted to get in the vehicle ALONE - They are LIARS1st of all, there was already a couple in the van when we got in.2ndly, we already had taken group tours via viator the prior days AND the following day.  I have PROOF of this through Viator. They did not check any passes or temperature.COMPLETE MONEY GRAB as we had only booked less than 12 hours prior and DID NOT TAKE THE TOUR!They renigged on their telling us that they  would refund.
